Derek,

In a few hours, Joe Biden will take the stage and make the biggest speech of his life.
After all Donald Trump’s hatred, dysfunction and corruption, watching Joe accept the nomination tonight should be a proud moment for our country.
Here’s why:
I’ve known Joe for over 40 years. He’s one of the most honorable people I’ve ever met. I’m proud to count him as a friend.
Joe hasn’t always had it easy. But through it all he’s been strong for his family and, above all else, our country.
**[Derek, Joe’s strength and character are exactly what America needs right now.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xbsx_0XfoDyqaI_iqmKmOJb6TigtGnR7L0br6_4-BJ2PxBLe4QWQRAvLpQJhMDg0ozZ3QM3Fnp1FQbeLkeZj9tATtEGDehfuuK20pfP9ddCpMfgGFH4_5fGa3aR4xR_j9iJwYBhXzxbu9_vvtTq_N6wNOUarBB4iM5KaIsKGQFZKD5j8Wt_28UASjyUflnl62vW5cV-uVDSWRAcUB6adn1ZBH1cxZMsRjLjQ3FpjD1hlWC1MX0ywfEyHxUzd8OgUE0xgGAMPuz4Qpmu9z9xT0fq6b7ndmAlzcBQ1HM85KuogONXnPSgos0elGS_P58fXmCMB_mFYtU4WvYi_g6Tm_MYabvJf-_-TpiNVi4g9x01Cs9qgB08fZBrCQjOfB6_Yw9o55DZrRc1CSyQj2nRVoupYo8ISgbY0ytv9ZAKxtPpWLton71JYO6YyNlvyDdwCFac_kmde9bQpGmjkTw-SFJ/34i/Ja-Raq4mQOaTw12wOiQqoQ/h2/4Bm_oqZ6Ksz99v48Xd6rsrVyRfNrVmc544ZAoqzKKuw) **
This November, we have a chance to not only to fire Donald Trump, but also to send one of the greatest public servants in the history of our country to the Oval Office at a moment when we need him most.
I’m proud to support Joe Biden and I need you to support him too.

name: Terry Neese
subject: The liberals' dirty tricks...
body:
They're not even waiting until after the runoff! Dear Friend,Well, we thought the Democrats would at least wait until after the runoff... but their dirty tricks and smear tactics are already here! We still have a runoff election on Tuesday to get through first, but I'm not going to sit back until then. Will you join me to **fight back against their last-minute lies and smear attacks?** [Fight Back - $10](https://terryneese.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pkhlhhd-elutjhyju-r/) [Fight Back - $20](https://terryneese.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pkhlhhd-elutjhyju-y/) [Fight Back - $50](https://terryneese.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pkhlhhd-elutjhyju-t/) They're scared for good reason. **They know that I have the best chance of defeating Kendra Horn,** so they're trying to smear me in the last few days ahead of the runoff election.[Will you help me stand up and fight back?](https://terryneese.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pkhlhhd-elutjhyju-i/) [Unsubscribe](https://terryneese.cmail20.com/t/t-u-pkhlhhd-elutjhyju-d/)

name: Joseph R. Biden Jr.
subject: The honor of my lifetime
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
|
---
Peter --

**It is the honor of my lifetime to accept your nomination for President of the United States.**

When I say we are in a battle for the soul of the nation, I mean it. This campaign is about more than winning an election, it's about deciding who we are as a country.

Growing up in Scranton, Pennsylvania, I learned the importance of hard work, treating others with dignity and respect, and leaving no one behind. Those values have guided my entire life. And now, I'm humbled by the responsibility you have entrusted in me to bring these values back to the White House.

Peter, right now we are a country divided, and the world is in disarray. But as my dad always said, "Champ, when you get knocked down, you get back up." And that's what I know we can do as a country -- we can get back up.

But here's the truth: we can only unite the country and win this battle if we work our hearts out every single day between now and November 3rd. And that's what I'm promising to do, my word as a Biden.

**But I need you in this fight with me, Peter. I don 't enjoy asking for your money, but this is a grassroots campaign, and grassroots supporters like you will power us to victory.**

[**If you 're ready to win in November, will you make your first donation to own a piece of this campaign? Anything you can give will make a real difference in this battle for the soul of the nation: **](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.20_B6_JRBaccepts_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=100&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.20_B6_JRBaccepts_X__F1_S1_C1__full") _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

**[Click here to express donate $25 >>](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.20_B6_JRBaccepts_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=25&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.20_B6_JRBaccepts_X__F1_S1_C1__full&express_lane=true")

[Click here to express donate $250 >>](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.20_B6_JRBaccepts_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=250&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.20_B6_JRBaccepts_X__F1_S1_C1__full&express_lane=true")

[Click here to donate another amount >>](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.20_B6_JRBaccepts_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=100&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.20_B6_JRBaccepts_X__F1_S1_C1__full")** Peter, we have the opportunity right now to seize this moment in history and make real change for working people.

In the midst of an economic crisis, a public health crisis, and a renewed call for racial justice, it won't be enough just to build back to where we were before. We have to build America back better.

That's why as President, and with Vice President Kamala Harris by my side, I am committed to making bold, historic investments in our country. We'll create millions of jobs, meet the challenge of climate change, regain America's leadership on the world stage, and more.

Tonight I accepted your nomination for President of the United States. Now, I hope you'll accept my challenge:

**Will you do everything you can over the next 75 days to make sure we win the battle for the soul of our nation?**

[**Peter, I hope you 'll make your first donation right now to power this campaign to victory and make sure we hit our $25 million convention goal before midnight.**](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.20_B6_JRBaccepts_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=100&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.20_B6_JRBaccepts_X__F1_S1_C1__full")

Thank you,

Joe

clean_body: | Peter -- It is the honor of my lifetime to accept your nomination for President of the United States. When I say we are in a battle for the soul of the nation, I mean it. This campaign is about more than winning an election, it's about deciding who we are as a country. Growing up in Scranton, Pennsylvania, I learned the importance of hard work, treating others with dignity and respect, and leaving no one behind. Those values have guided my entire life. And now, I'm humbled by the responsibility you have entrusted in me to bring these values back to the White House. Peter, right now we are a country divided, and the world is in disarray. But as my dad always said, "Champ, when you get knocked down, you get back up." And that's what I know we can do as a country -- we can get back up. But here's the truth: we can only unite the country and win this battle if we work our hearts out every single day between now and November 3rd. And that's what I'm promising to do, my word as a Biden. But I need you in this fight with me, Peter. I don 't enjoy asking for your money, but this is a grassroots campaign, and grassroots supporters like you will power us to victory. "" If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: "" "" "" "" "" "" Peter, we have the opportunity right now to seize this moment in history and make real change for working people. In the midst of an economic crisis, a public health crisis, and a renewed call for racial justice, it won't be enough just to build back to where we were before. We have to build America back better. That's why as President, and with Vice President Kamala Harris by my side, I am committed to making bold, historic investments in our country. We'll create millions of jobs, meet the challenge of climate change, regain America's leadership on the world stage, and more. Tonight I accepted your nomination for President of the United States. Now, I hope you'll accept my challenge: Will you do everything you can over the next 75 days to make sure we win the battle for the soul of our nation? "" Thank you, Joe | | "" "" "" "" Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. "" Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

name: Team Nehls
subject: Join our Grassroots Victory Team!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nehls for Congress
body:
✋ Sign up today. We'll get in touch to discuss how you can help elect Sheriff Troy Nehls to Congress!
Friend, As you know, we won a decisive primary runoff victory just a few short weeks ago.

We can say, without any doubt, that we could not have to it without our amazing grassroots campaign volunteers across the 22nd District...

**Now, we need to gear up to keep this seat in the hands of a local public servant and send Sheriff Troy Nehls to Congress to fight for our communities and our way of life!**

[**Will you join our Grassroots Victory Team today?**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/168f51168d3e1e92/0b4326ae9623eb31c3d6b838967d376c/35193)

There are a ton of ways to help – from making phone calls to delivering literature and yard signs to hosting or helping with local events.

We’ve got 82 days to connect with voters, fire up our supporters, and WIN... _and we need to make every one of them count!_

Dear Friend, In accepting the nomination of the Democratic Party for President last night, Joe Biden laid out the choice we face: a return to normalcy, decency, competency, and unity, or a continuation of the hyper-partisan divisiveness the has torn this nation apart and resulted in a federal government incapable of fulfilling its basic responsibility to protect the lives and livelihoods of the American people. We face that choice in my race as well. I'm a private citizen, seeking to restore YOUR voice in Washington, and to restore Congress as an equal branch of government as the Founding Fathers intended. Pete Sessions' is a DC insider whose stated purpose is to restore a Republican majority and oust Nancy Pelosi from the speakership. Nothing to do with the people of Central Texas or the future of our nation. His disdain for the institution in which he served until fired by voters in Dallas in 2018 runs so deep [he once failed to show up to be sworn in](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18784347/239619467/1802363210?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjI3MjViNS1iNWUzLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ey_zv-AYReuufna-aFq45L2Q4YlXGBGm9NNoF3Z6MLk=&emci=dc0bd7d6-ace3-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=962725b5-b5e3-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&ceid=10438639). Pete is part of the problem. Pete is part of the past. Help me keep him there. _**[Demand Better. Pitch in now and help me beat Pete](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18784348/239619468/-1907457920?refcode=08216_line&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjI3MjViNS1iNWUzLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ey_zv-AYReuufna-aFq45L2Q4YlXGBGm9NNoF3Z6MLk=).**_ _If you've saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately:_ | [CONTRIBUTE $50](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18784349/239619469/-1907457920?refcode=0821_Donor_Button50&amount=50&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjI3MjViNS1iNWUzLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ey_zv-AYReuufna-aFq45L2Q4YlXGBGm9NNoF3Z6MLk=)

name: Sandy Smith
subject: They cut out God
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SANDY SMITH FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
| | | [ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=iIwEtTPWd3Nxmng&b=ULbTBlbVAUOe2AqoK3fh7A)
---

Dear Peter,

**I am Sandy Smith, the Republican nominee for Congress in North Carolina’s newly redrawn 1st Congressional district. **

I am a patriot and a Christian! I have been greatly blessed by God, and so I kneel before Him in thanks. I think that's the least I can do.
_**The anti-American Democrats, on the other hand, do not. **_
There have been all kinds of kooky things in this Democrat Convention. Elizabeth Warren headlining a "Native American panel" (!!!!). Kamala Harris, telling America that women could trust Joe Biden- someone she implied was a sexual assaulter.
But the weirdest thing? The Democrats booting God from their convention.
_Two delegates at the Democratic National Convention omitted the words "under God" when they recited the Pledge of Allegiance during caucus meetings this week._
_"I pledge allegiance to the flag of the United States of America. And to the republic for which it stands. One nation, indivisible, with liberty and justice for all," delegate A.J. Durrani said during the DNC's virtual assembly of Muslim delegates and allies._
_Another delegate also omitted the words during the LGBTQ caucus meeting on Tuesday. The delegate paused for a beat, then proceeded with the pledge._
**_Taking aside how Democrats only see Americans by their liberal labels (Muslims, gays, etc), apparently the only group they don't cater to is.... Christians?_**
**_This is so dangerous. This is the reason why the Dems are ok with some lives mattering more than others. They have no values to fall back on, no moral code._**
For my sake, however, I go back to what George Washington, the founder of our country, said about the Bible:
**_“It is the duty of all nations to acknowledge the providence of Almighty God, to obey His will, to be grateful for His benefits, and humbly to implore His protection and favor.”_**
**_– George Washington_**
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=iIwEtTPWd3Nxmng&b=m9wLY31Wh1f42LPGkme_5w)
---
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=iIwEtTPWd3Nxmng&b=m9wLY31Wh1f42LPGkme_5w)
---

_But the Dems? The only thing they kneel for is Socialism!_

[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=iIwEtTPWd3Nxmng&b=m9wLY31Wh1f42LPGkme_5w)
---

**_It is clear that the Democrats hate people of faith. They particularly hate Christians, and they want to keep us from exercising our Constitutionally-protected Freedom of Religion. _**

You cannot govern a nation without faith. You cannot govern a nation without morals or humility, but that's what the Dems are trying to do.

_Socialism is their "god", and abortion is their sacrament._

_The Left wants to play God and tell us which lives matter more than others. Which deserve to live and which deserve to die._

**That's not right! We are all God's children and Americans- and we need to see each other equally and kneel before God!**

[If that isn't YOUR vision for America, I need your help to change Congress and evict Pelosi!](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=iIwEtTPWd3Nxmng&b=m9wLY31Wh1f42LPGkme_5w) Unlike Pelosi, unlike Butterfield, I will govern with humility as a person of faith!

[Can you help me take this swing district back](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=iIwEtTPWd3Nxmng&b=m9wLY31Wh1f42LPGkme_5w), with your best and immediate contribution of $15, $35, or $250? Taking out my opponent, one of Pelosi’s leading lieutenants, would be a crippling blow to the Democrat Socialists and to Nancy Pelosi’s agenda.

G.K. Butterfield is a Swampy radical, not a patriot, but to replace him I [really need your help](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=iIwEtTPWd3Nxmng&b=m9wLY31Wh1f42LPGkme_5w). Our country needs fighters like you and me. Let's stand up now, before it's too late!

For God and Country,
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=iIwEtTPWd3Nxmng&b=m9wLY31Wh1f42LPGkme_5w)
---
Sandy Smith
Republican for Congress, North Carolina's new First District
Conservative
Entrepreneur & Military mom
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=iIwEtTPWd3Nxmng&b=m9wLY31Wh1f42LPGkme_5w)
---
P.S. [Will you contribute $15, $60, $250, or your largest contribution?](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=iIwEtTPWd3Nxmng&b=m9wLY31Wh1f42LPGkme_5w) I need to reach my goal to catch up with Butterfield.

PAID FOR BY SANDY SMITH FOR CONGRESS INC

P.O. Box 434
Winterville NC 28590
USA

[Unsubscribe](https://www.aweber.com/z/r/?rMyMrEwcrLQcbIyMTGxMzLRGtCzszIwMDBxM) | [Change Subscriber Options](https://www.aweber.com/z/r/?rMyMrEwcrLQcbIyMTGxMzLRGtCzszIwMDBxM)

name: Bill Olson
subject: ICYMI: We Won Bigly
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Bill Olson for Congress

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=il.yduvukF6OuRU&b=izt0daNhQ0LP7xD_ZD1vZg

Hi Peter,

My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet who just overwhelmingly won my primary! I am the new Republican nominee, running to take back Florida’s competitive 9th District, currently held by Socialist Democrat Darren Soto. And I will stand shoulder to shoulder with President Trump as we fight far-Left Socialism!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=il.yduvukF6OuRU&b=izt0daNhQ0LP7xD_ZD1vZg

OK, that's behind us- but now, we have a bigger task.

The Democrats - radicalized, violent, propagandized, and dangerous- seek power in November. But they do not seek to improve your life or improve the Republic.

They seek to destroy us all, in the name of a Marxist revolution none of us need or want. They want to take our freedom and our property out of the most bizarre sense of entitlement I've ever seen:

A group of Black Lives Matter protesters in Seattle marched through a residential neighborhood this week demanding that white residents give up their homes, dramatic video shows.

Footage of the Wednesday demonstration posted to Twitter shows a crowd of dozens chanting “Black lives matter” before an unidentified man projects his ire toward nearby white residents — saying they are living in a historically black section of the city as another woman in the crowd yells that they should “give up” their homes, the clip shows.

“Do you know that before your white ass came here, this was all black people?” the man says. “Do you know people like you came in here and basically bought all the land from the black people for less than what it was worth, kicked them out so you could live here? Do you know that?”

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=il.yduvukF6OuRU&b=izt0daNhQ0LP7xD_ZD1vZg

That's right. A Democrat mob doesn't like you, so you have to give up your home? Is this what you want for the next four years?

We are America! We won two World Wars, sent men to the moon, discovered the nuke, built our country to have the highest standard of living in the world. We were the first to guarantee basic liberties to every citizen.

We can do better than this!

Look, I’m just a regular guy. I am not a political bigshot. But 14 months ago I renewed my military oath to protect and defend the Constitution of the United States from all enemies foreign and domestic. Little did I suspect that the Democrat Party would be the home of many of those domestic enemies!

Marxist revolution may become our reality- unless we do something RIGHT NOW!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=il.yduvukF6OuRU&b=izt0daNhQ0LP7xD_ZD1vZg

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=il.yduvukF6OuRU&b=izt0daNhQ0LP7xD_ZD1vZg

Darren Soto is just like Joe Biden: a Trojan Horse for Socialism, someone who believes far-Left conspiracy theories, and makes excuses for the violent excesses of the far Left.

We patriots must fight now or our country and our freedoms will be lost. Will you stand with me

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=il.yduvukF6OuRU&b=izt0daNhQ0LP7xD_ZD1vZg
?

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=il.yduvukF6OuRU&b=izt0daNhQ0LP7xD_ZD1vZg

I'm an unapologetic patriot. Joe Biden won't stand up for our country. Darren Soto sure as heck won't- he votes with Pelosi 93% of the time!

But I have taken an oath to the Constitution- one that has no expiration date! I don't have big swampy PAC money, which is why I need your help!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=il.yduvukF6OuRU&b=izt0daNhQ0LP7xD_ZD1vZg

I am calling all patriots to help me to replace Socialist Darren Soto, and stand up for our freedoms as Americans! I am now the official Republican nominee, and I need your help to win in November!

I need your help to stand up FOR the Constitution and AGAINST Communism!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=il.yduvukF6OuRU&b=izt0daNhQ0LP7xD_ZD1vZg

Can you help me?

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=il.yduvukF6OuRU&b=izt0daNhQ0LP7xD_ZD1vZg
This is a swing district and we can take it back!

Can I count on you for a donation

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=il.yduvukF6OuRU&b=izt0daNhQ0LP7xD_ZD1vZg
today? I have a goal of $50,000 raised by the end of August to get on the air asap. That's why I need your help today!

I'm going to make sure the radical Democrats like Biden and Soto lose BIG this year - with your help!

Let's get this done!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=il.yduvukF6OuRU&b=izt0daNhQ0LP7xD_ZD1vZg

Bill Olson

Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars

Supports President Trump

Not a Career Politician

Hard Core Conservative Fighter

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=il.yduvukF6OuRU&b=izt0daNhQ0LP7xD_ZD1vZg

P.S. I really need your help today

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=il.yduvukF6OuRU&b=izt0daNhQ0LP7xD_ZD1vZg
, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - WITH YOUR HELP!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=il.yduvukF6OuRU&b=izt0daNhQ0LP7xD_ZD1vZg
Thank you and God bless America! - Bill.

PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS

Bill Olson is a retired member of the United States Army. Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense.

5 Halifax Ct
Marlton NJ 08053

Friend,

_This is THE MOST COMPETITIVE Senate race in the country._

**MoveOn just released a new poll showing Jon Ossoff tied with his opponent, GOP Sen. David Perdue, 44% to 44%!**

| Patriot,
The Democrats officially chose their Presidential ticket yesterday, and the race for 2020 is on!
The stage is set for a matchup between Slow Joe/Phony Kamala and the Keep America Great movement. The Democrats nominated quite possibly the weakest ticket in recent history, but the mainstream media, the Hollywood elite, and the DC Swamp are going to do whatever they can to prop them up.
Last election, using Russian misinformation paid for by the Hillary Clinton campaign, Deep State actors spied on the President's campaign and tried to steal the election. You can bet they will be up to similar dirty tricks, so it's critical we start off this campaign season strong.
Can you help us take on Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, and the powerful donor class that wants them in the White House?

subject: re: last night

body:
It's going to take all of us, and I mean all of us, doing our part to energize and mobilize the vote this fall. |
---
Peter,

I can't overstate the importance of this past week. What an incredible convention -- and the energy behind our ticket heading into the final two months of this race is _real_.

As I watched Joe formally accept the nomination last night to be our Democratic candidate for President, I felt the urgency and historical significance of this moment -- and I hope you did too.

It's going to take all of us, and I mean _all of us_ , doing our part to energize and mobilize the vote this fall. **Peter, we can't waste a single second.**

[**That's why I'm following up on Joe's email from last night, and asking you pitch in your first $25 into the Biden-Harris Founding Donor Fund to power the work we need to do to win this election »**](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_kdhjrb_foundingdonor?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.21_B1_KDHfwd_X__F1_S2_C1__full&amount=25&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.21_B1_KDHfwd_X__F1_S2_C1__full") | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

**\---FORWARDED MESSAGE---**
From: Joseph R. Biden Jr
Date: Thu, Aug 20, 2020
Subject: The honor of my lifetime
To: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_kdhjrb_foundingdonor?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.21_B1_KDHfwd_X__F1_S2_C1__full&amount=100&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.21_B1_KDHfwd_X__F1_S2_C1__full")
Peter --

**It is the honor of my lifetime to accept your nomination for President of the United States.**

When I say we are in a battle for the soul of the nation, I mean it. This campaign is about more than winning an election, it's about deciding who we are as a country.

Growing up in Scranton, Pennsylvania, I learned the importance of hard work, treating others with dignity and respect, and leaving no one behind. Those values have guided my entire life. And now, I'm humbled by the responsibility you have entrusted in me to bring these values back to the White House.

Peter, right now we are a country divided, and the world is in disarray. But as my dad always said, "Champ, when you get knocked down, you get back up." And that's what I know we can do as a country -- we can get back up.

But here's the truth: we can only unite the country and win this battle if we work our hearts out every single day between now and November 3rd. And that's what I'm promising to do, my word as a Biden.

**But I need you in this fight with me, Peter. I don 't enjoy asking for your money, but this is a grassroots campaign, and grassroots supporters like you will power us to victory.**

[**If you 're ready to win in November, will you make your first donation to own a piece of this campaign? Anything you can give will make a real difference in this battle for the soul of the nation: **](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_kdhjrb_foundingdonor?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.21_B1_KDHfwd_X__F1_S2_C1__full&amount=100&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.21_B1_KDHfwd_X__F1_S2_C1__full")

Peter, we have the opportunity right now to seize this moment in history and make real change for working people.

In the midst of an economic crisis, a public health crisis, and a renewed call for racial justice, it won't be enough just to build back to where we were before. We have to build America back better.

That's why as President, and with Vice President Kamala Harris by my side, I am committed to making bold, historic investments in our country. We'll create millions of jobs, meet the challenge of climate change, regain America's leadership on the world stage, and more.

Tonight I accepted your nomination for President of the United States. Now, I hope you'll accept my challenge:

**Will you do everything you can over the next 75 days to make sure we win the battle for the soul of our nation?**

[**Peter, I hope you 'll make your first donation right now to power this campaign to victory and make sure we hit our $25 million convention goal before midnight.**](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_kdhjrb_foundingdonor?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.21_B1_KDHfwd_X__F1_S2_C1__full&amount=100&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.21_B1_KDHfwd_X__F1_S2_C1__full")

And now, I'm humbled by the responsibility you have entrusted in me to bring these values back to the White House. Peter, right now we are a country divided, and the world is in disarray. But as my dad always said, "Champ, when you get knocked down, you get back up." And that's what I know we can do as a country -- we can get back up. But here's the truth: we can only unite the country and win this battle if we work our hearts out every single day between now and November 3rd. Last weekend ANTIFA protesters trashed more businesses in Brooklyn, breaking windows and spray painting ‘FTP’ (‘F--k the police’) on buildings.

Will this become the new normal in NYC?

Violent crimes continue to cause havoc on our streets, destroying our neighborhoods and costing our already struggling businesses. The radicals want to completely eliminate cash bail, dismantle our police department, and leave our families defenseless.

Max Rose and every member of our city’s congressional committee have been completely silent on Antifa and their anarchy.

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Help us reach literally every Texas voter →
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE, POWEREDXPEOPLE
body:
I’m excited to share with you that we have now made over 20 million Texas
voter contact attempts so far this year. This is person to person
outreach. Not TV ads or tweets, not Facebook messages or robocalls. Real
human connection that ensures we are talking and listening to the voters
who will determine the outcome of this election.

By knocking on doors before the pandemic hit, and taking to the phones
after it was no longer safe to canvass in person, Powered by People
volunteers have reached out to more Texas voters than just about anyone
thought was possible. Maybe even enough voters to help decide the outcome
of the most important elections of our lives.

But we’re not going to stop now, or even slow down.

In fact, over the next 74 days we plan to double that number, personally
reaching out to literally every registered voter in the state. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/17167?t=1001&akid=102073%2E444211%2EFMjNyT ]And you
can join us on a future phone bank to make sure we do it.

This voter contact effort will produce the biggest, most accurate and most
actionable list of likely Democratic voters in the state of Texas.

That means that our candidates - whether running for state rep, U.S.
Congress or the White House - will be able to turn out the voters most
likely to vote for them. They won’t waste their time calling Trump voters
or wrong numbers, because our volunteers will have already attempted those
calls and will strike those names and numbers from the final list.

At a moment when our candidates can’t campaign in person, or hold rallies
and town halls, they will be able to focus 100% of their efforts on
confirmed Democratic voters.

That’s how we win a Democratic majority in the State House; that’s how we
win more seats in Congress and help MJ Hegar defeat John Cornyn; and
that’s the best way to ensure Joe Biden has a chance to become the first
Democratic nominee to win Texas since 1976.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/17167?t=1002&akid=102073%2E444211%2EFMjNyT ]We’d love to have your help at an upcoming phone bank to continue this
work and make sure we meet the ambitious goals we’ve set for ourselves and
Texas.

Next week, in partnership with Congresswoman Veronica Escobar, we are
going to focus our phone banks on Texas border communities — counties that
are 80-95% Mexican-American, the places hit hardest by COVID (like the Rio
Grande Valley where they are storing bodies in refrigerated trucks because
they’ve run out of space in the morgues and funeral homes), to make sure
that no voter is taken for granted, no matter how reliably Democratic, no
matter how far from the centers of power. And to ensure that ultimately
there is justice and accountability in our democracy.

I hope you’ll join Congresswoman Escobar and me on that phone bank. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/event/virtual-border-bus-tour_attend/34403?source=ema20200821-102073&t=1003&akid=102073%2E444211%2EFMjNyT ]You
can sign up for that here:

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/event/virtual-border-bus-tour_attend/34403?source=ema20200821-102073&t=1004&akid=102073%2E444211%2EFMjNyT ]Get more info or RSVP »

In summary: we’ve called a hell of a lot of people over the last few
months. But we could double that number if more volunteers step up and
join this effort. If that happens, our chances of winning the Texas House,
the U.S. Senate and the White House dramatically increase.

It literally depends on you.

See you soon,

Beto

[5]Beto sitting at his desk, looking at a tablet with a Zoom call on the
screen.

I joined nearly 300 volunteers on Wednesday night's Powered by People
phone bank. In just over one hour we made over 112,000 phone calls to
Texas voters.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43023?source=ema20200821-102073&t=1005&akid=102073%2E444211%2EFMjNyT ]Contribute

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1006&akid=102073%2E444211%2EFMjNyT

PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE, POWEREDXPEOPLE.ORG, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE.

name: Holcomb Crew
subject: The Indy 500 is coming up. Are you going to watch?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
Shhhhh....can you hear that? It’s the sound of engines rumbling. That’s right, the Indy 500 is back! | |
---
| [](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=aa43577241c94000b5c26185a66b6479&_e=n-sQrqX2833gqCCWBJe_WOWHvqrynjDl3pQbOKgGgLwBi89HkmZ6Ux8ZjKS064GtlTScgUmQBVRzgYyuhbeBOjlh0Y5UsZGd6GnLA7cV1FaXJjgY_0aqanJy450hiKJeT6JxmUOEfwLWs_p7MLvjCE72OTxpNbfGHjftFEU3HfttyHzR8yZJDQOXMVP10iQyC4myfBBNN7cAsBxdKhEVpTys_NDuAb3I74ofzkx8ofSk8sTJQTLH38GHCGWl_Zhxk8-_ALXOz2aA5TIF3-qlq9gX0-ccVrjvNMQL9Nr6xwfpUjXtKhhwINkPhbP7Ee2Z49ECdOUejB2KBH0G92qgNFkAIjGGg4RW0Ito7WL9wHAndvAT2MojMxHG5s3Hiu6cgn_E8O3MCAha9pypN1kUfAtkQwRYOeYDg-ioC2rHxv8jBe0v60d3fzebvVghVApW3TrMHvoePpc5Keq9x8TOuD9h6Gc0I5UJ2UDmWEt9JuE%3D) |
---|---|---
|
---
Friend,

Shhhhh....can you hear that?

_It’s the sound of engines roaring._

**That’s right, the Indy 500 is back!**

On Sunday, drivers will return to Indianapolis Motor Speedway to compete in “ _The Greatest Spectacle in Racing._ ” It’s going to be a little different this year — there won’t be 300,000 screaming fans at the Brickyard and joining together to sing Back Home in Indiana. And, of course, the race is running a little bit later in the year.

But that doesn’t mean it’s going to be any less exciting to watch 33 of the world’s best drivers compete for the chance to sip from the traditional bottle of milk on victory lane.

Governor Holcomb will watch the race from home this Sunday. With no local blackout this year, let’s set a new record. Since we can’t pack the Speedway, let’s join Eric and set a ratings record for the 500!

Our crew cannot wait to watch on Sunday, but we want to know — are you planning on watching the Indy 500? Let us know.
[**Yes, I’m excited and planning on watching the Indy 500**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=aa43577241c94000b5c26185a66b6479&_e=n-sQrqX2833gqCCWBJe_WOWHvqrynjDl3pQbOKgGgLwBi89HkmZ6Ux8ZjKS064GtlTScgUmQBVRzgYyuhbeBOjlh0Y5UsZGd6GnLA7cV1FaXJjgY_0aqanJy450hiKJeT6JxmUOEfwLWs_p7MLvjCE72OTxpNbfGHjftFEU3HfttyHzR8yZJDQOXMVP10iQyC4myfBBNN7cAsBxdKhEVpTys_NDuAb3I74ofzkx8ofSk8sTJQTLH38GHCGWl_Zhxk8-_ALXOz2aA5TIF3-qlq_ELhLMVO6nsRfLfILPKIaxSHzVn28PxzK48f4PNdLUvgesncgrBLpaYb6LZ8KECvdzrgEFVlpvYlflkT84SfH1Y4Se8eqJHm0Qca-2D4LkIMmbfrTe-FPhfyB6iQCKVnoQ05zZJSgrAhnQ4ElnJoJTiT3QnhO6U0oKXoQ1d6QwITYfjdBF193BcdSysdObZ5P4cD__2KlBCF3jJ5JT51eU%3D)
Thanks,

Holcomb Crew

name: Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: HCQ Works, Texas Ready to Open, Trump cuts Biden’s Lead, and more
body:
**[Web version](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/m/1/49109489/02-b20234-01499542548c48fea0c4abae9a6a3135/78/892/4b8c1230-4ae1-4c32-abfb-47f92435ac1c)** The continued debate over hydroxychloroquine definitively proves that politics can get in the way of science. Furthermore, if the science gets in the way of the Democrats' narrative, it will surely be ignored by Democrats and their propaganda outlets (a.k.a the Mainstream Media)... Hydroxychloroquine is a prime example of this. Based on the best evidence available today, hydroxychloroquine — HCQ, for short — has been shown to be effective in early-stage treatment of COVID-19, the illness brought on by the novel coronavirus. Because of hyper-politicization, however, this evidence is being ignored. After all, if there’s an effective treatment for COVID-19, then maybe the shutdowns and distance learning for our children and mask mandates and social distancing requirements aren’t necessary, from a medical standpoint. And if they’re not necessary from a medical standpoint, then what excuse could we use to keep the schools closed for in-person learning, and to keep the businesses shuttered, and to keep the rest of society under government’s thumb? [As Jenny Beth Martin and James Todaro explain](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjM0LTAxNDk5NTQyNTQ4YzQ4ZmVhMGM0YWJhZTlhNmEzMTM1%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud2FzaGluZ3RvbnRpbWVzLmNvbS9uZXdzLzIwMjAvYXVnLzE4L2hvdy10aGUtaHlkcm94eWNobG9yb3F1aW5lLWRlYmF0ZS1wcm92ZXMtcG9saXRpY3MtLz9taWQ9NDI1NTYmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=hozVjAjGiu5Q7FDuehJB4Q), this may be exactly why Democrats and their propaganda outlets are not only ignoring the science supporting HCQ, but actively running disinformation campaigns against it. [ ](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjM0LTAxNDk5NTQyNTQ4YzQ4ZmVhMGM0YWJhZTlhNmEzMTM1%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud2FzaGluZ3RvbnRpbWVzLmNvbS9uZXdzLzIwMjAvYXVnLzE4L2hvdy10aGUtaHlkcm94eWNobG9yb3F1aW5lLWRlYmF0ZS1wcm92ZXMtcG9saXRpY3MtLz9taWQ9NDI1NTYmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=2QKIwvyp0fIWOyMboZUy7Q) **[How the hydroxychloroquine debate proves politics can get in the way of science](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjM0LTAxNDk5NTQyNTQ4YzQ4ZmVhMGM0YWJhZTlhNmEzMTM1%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%&K=QFCjtbs7sN4kBP8-bzqEmg)**
Trofim Lysenko, Stalin’s director of biology, is best remembered for blocking the science of Mendelian genetics because the science was stubbornly resistant to Marxist ideology. **[Read more...](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjM0LTAxNDk5NTQyNTQ4YzQ4ZmVhMGM0YWJhZTlhNmEzMTM1%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud2FzaGluZ3RvbnRpbWVzLmNvbS9uZXdzLzIwMjAvYXVnLzE4L2hvdy10aGUtaHlkcm94eWNobG9yb3F1aW5lLWRlYmF0ZS1wcm92ZXMtcG9saXRpY3MtLz9taWQ9NDI1NTYmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=VHGijnTRNQe-WFOU5cDheA)** | |
---
**Event: Texas – Ready to Open!**

There’s a great event pushing for reopening happening in Dallas, TX on Monday, August 24th, which Jenny Beth Martin will also be attending. If you are in Texas and able to get to Dallas (we know Texas is a big state...), please come! Don’t you love it when the Democrats’ propaganda outlets (a.k.a. the Mainstream Media) accidentally disprove their own narrative AND, in the process, prove President Trump right (again)?

Well that glorious moment happened once again this week, when CNN released the results of their national poll, which had previously shown Joe Biden with a double-digit lead over Donald Trump. The new results told a different story though.

According to CNN’s most recent national poll, Joe Biden’s alleged “double-digit lead” over President Trump has evaporated leading up to the Democrats’ own convention.

Biden’s lead narrowed from 14 points to 4 points. Since the convention started Monday, Biden's lead has been dropping, according to Real Clear Politics' average of polls.

So, that means not only has Biden leaving the basement caused his poll numbers to drop, but so has his terrible VP choice.

As Biden becomes more visible, the opinion of the American people becomes more clear: they want to re-elect President Trump.

This past week we had to sit through 4 grueling nights of Democrats’ incessant pandering and lying, otherwise known as the Democratic National Convention.

What was advertised as an event to celebrate the nomination of Joe Biden for President and Kamala Harris for Vice President, looked more like an angry event aimed at hiding Biden at all costs.

From failed gubernatorial candidates (a.k.a. Stacey Abrams) to failed presidential candidates (a.k.a. all the losers from the Democratic primary groveling for a Cabinet position), the Democrats did all they could to keep Biden from making any and all prolonged appearances.

They even had Barack Obama, Michelle Obama, and Hillary Clinton deliver speeches in support of Biden in public, despite the fact they all expressed profound doubts about his candidacy in private. When they finally sort-of brought out Joe Biden, he repeated – again – what Dilbert cartoon creator Scott Adams rightfully calls, “the most divisive lie in American history,” and that doing so is “disqualifying.” It’s also disgusting.

All in all, the Democratic National Convention, for all its pandering and lying, was useful in one regard. It showed the Democrats' game plan. First, hide Joe Biden from the American people at all costs and let the people who will actually be calling the shots, if he's elected, do the talking for him. And second, keep lying in the hopes that the truth won’t come out before November.

Let’s make sure the truth gets out, shall we?
|

clean_body: The continued debate over hydroxychloroquine definitively proves that politics can get in the way of science. Furthermore, if the science gets in the way of the Democrats' narrative, it will surely be ignored by Democrats and their propaganda outlets (a.k.a the Mainstream Media)... Hydroxychloroquine is a prime example of this. Based on the best evidence available today, hydroxychloroquine — HCQ, for short — has been shown to be effective in early-stage treatment of COVID-19, the illness brought on by the novel coronavirus. Because of hyper-politicization, however, this evidence is being ignored. After all, if there’s an effective treatment for COVID-19, then maybe the shutdowns and distance learning for our children and mask mandates and social distancing requirements aren’t necessary, from a medical standpoint. And if they’re not necessary from a medical standpoint, then what excuse could we use to keep the schools closed for in-person learning, and to keep the businesses shuttered, and to keep the rest of society under government’s thumb? , this may be exactly why Democrats and their propaganda outlets are not only ignoring the science supporting HCQ, but actively running disinformation campaigns against it. Born and raised on a small farm in Nambe, New Mexico, by a union ironworker and a public school employee, Ben Ray is running for Senate to build a better future for all families.

Ben Ray knows that our communities are stronger when everyone has a fair shot. He's dedicated his career to creating good-paying jobs for hardworking New Mexicans, expanding health care, and protecting our natural resources.

As Assistant Speaker in the U.S. House of Representatives, Ben Ray has worked to pass a people-first agenda that helps all Americans -- from lowering prescription drug prices to preventing gun violence, protecting our immigrant communities, improving equity in our criminal justice system, and removing the dark influence of money in politics. He is proud to be endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund, NARAL Pro-Choice America, AFSCME, American Nurses Association, League of Conservation Voters, Brady Campaign to End Gun Violence, Giffords, Human Rights Campaign, Latino Victory Fund, Congressional Black Caucus PAC, Council for a Livable World, and End Citizens United.

**Ben Ray doesn 't take a dollar from corporate PACs. Will you pitch in to fund our people-powered movement today?** **[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2c7/18e32a7f/4a349669/7b20e723/4141277655/VEsHBw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")** We know that we send you a lot of emails. If you would like to only receive the most important updates, [_click here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2c7/18e32a7f/4a349669/7b20e720/4141277655/VEsHBg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails").

If you would like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. You can keep up with our campaign by visiting us on _[Facebook](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2c7/18e32a7f/4a349669/7b20e721/4141277655/VEsHAQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan/")_ or _[Twitter](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2c7/18e32a7f/4a349669/7b20e72d/4141277655/VEsHAA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan")_ or _[Youtube](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2c7/18e32a7f/4a349669/7b20e72f/4141277655/VEsHAw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.youtube.com/c/benraylujan")_ or online at _[benraylujan.com](www.benraylujan.com)_. Click [_here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2c7/18e32a7f/4a349669/7b20e726/4141277655/VEsHAg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe") to unsubscribe and your request will be promptly processed.

I'll be totally transparent with you in this moment -- because this is just too vital. "" I refuse to tolerate these blatant lies. Especially not from a man who wraps his arms around Donald Trump and his disastrous policies. But we can't win the Senate without winning New Mexico -- so I can't overstate the importance of this moment. If grassroots Democrats don't stand together and fight back right now, my opponent's dishonest attacks will go unchallenged, and it'll put Democrats' chances to win the Senate at risk. I can't put into words how important the next 12 hours are. "" | | **** ""** ** ""** ** ""** ** ""** ** ""** Thank you for your support, Ben Ray "" "" "" "" Born and raised on a small farm in Nambe, New Mexico, by a union ironworker and a public school employee, Ben Ray is running for Senate to build a better future for all families. Ben Ray knows that our communities are stronger when everyone has a fair shot. He's dedicated his career to creating good-paying jobs for hardworking New Mexicans, expanding health care, and protecting our natural resources. As Assistant Speaker in the U.S. House of Representatives, Ben Ray has worked to pass a people-first agenda that helps all Americans -- from lowering prescription drug prices to preventing gun violence, protecting our immigrant communities, improving equity in our criminal justice system, and removing the dark influence of money in politics. He is proud to be endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund, NARAL Pro-Choice America, AFSCME, American Nurses Association, League of Conservation Voters, Brady Campaign to End Gun Violence, Giffords, Human Rights Campaign, Latino Victory Fund, Congressional Black Caucus PAC, Council for a Livable World, and End Citizens United. Ben Ray doesn 't take a dollar from corporate PACs. Will you pitch in to fund our people-powered movement today? ""** We know that we send you a lot of emails. If you would like to only receive the most important updates, "". If you would like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. You can keep up with our campaign by visiting us on "" or "" or "" or online at www.benraylujan.com. Click "" to unsubscribe and your request will be promptly processed. People for Ben PO Box 25371 Albuquerque, NM 87125 | | Paid for and authorized by People for Ben.

| | Friends – This week’s Democratic National Convention has been an inspiring display of the values we need in our elected leaders. Seeing Joe Biden and Kamala Harris officially accept the nomination and make history is exactly the momentum boost we need to gear up for the final stretch of this election.

**That momentum is with us on Team Barrett, and we’re fired up and ready to win at every level – from the White House to GA-11 – on November 3!**

I’m chatting with Dana soon to map out our plan for the next couple months, and we need to make sure we have the resources to keep growing our team and connecting with people across the district. **That’s where you come in: our campaign is powered by folks like you chipping in a few dollars, not deep-pocketed shady donors.**

name: Jon Ossoff
subject: Friend, this is the most important election of our lifetime
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
We will decide the direction of our nation |
---
Friend,

_This is the most important election of OUR LIFETIME._

**In November, we are making a decision about this country's future that will define us for generations.**

As Joe Biden said last night, "Character is on the ballot. Compassion is on the ballot. Decency, science, democracy. They are all on the ballot."

We can choose to create an America built on unity, decency, compassion, and integrity. A country where every citizen has great health care. Where voting rights are sacred. A country with equal justice under the law, and where dark money doesn't corrupt our political system.

**[Friend, when I win this U.S. Senate race in Georgia, I'll go to work to build a country that lives up to those values. Can you chip in $20 today to help me secure that victory?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e25f1/5b2c1286/3f745a65/25f04903/492685242/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_21_jo_state_race?refcode=em_2020_08_21_jo_state_race&amount=20")**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [EXPRESS DONATE: $20](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e25f1/5b2c1286/3f745a65/25f04902/492685242/VEsE/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_21_jo_state_race?express_lane=true&amount=20&refcode=em_2020_08_21_jo_state_race_ex_20")
---
| [EXPRESS DONATE: $50](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e25f1/5b2c1286/3f745a65/25f04905/492685242/VEsF/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_21_jo_state_race?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em_2020_08_21_jo_state_race_ex_50")
---
| [Or donate another amount](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e25f1/5b2c1286/3f745a65/25f04904/492685242/VEsC/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_21_jo_state_race?express_lane_other=true&refcode=em_2020_08_21_jo_state_race_ex_other")
---
We are poised to win here.

Vice President Joe Biden and Senator Kamala Harris are going to energize voters in Georgia, helping Democratic candidates up and down the ticket.

Democratic turnout in June's primary shattered records.

_And with two Senate races here, Georgia will be the decisive battleground state!_

In 2014, the GOP won Georgia by 8%. In 2016, 5%. In 2018, 1.4%. Now we are poised to win.

**[But Friend, I can't do it without you. Will you donate $20 today to power us to victory?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e25f1/5b2c1286/3f745a65/25f04903/492685242/VEsD/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_21_jo_state_race?refcode=em_2020_08_21_jo_state_race&amount=20")**

| [EXPRESS DONATE: $20](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e25f1/5b2c1286/3f745a65/25f04902/492685242/VEsA/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_21_jo_state_race?express_lane=true&amount=20&refcode=em_2020_08_21_jo_state_race_ex_20")
---
Your support means the world to me.

Jon

body:
The White House just doubled down on their promise to destroy programs like Social Security and Medicare.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18795707/239814611/462758527?refcode=em_pet_2020.08.21_b1_te_all-nd&refcode2=21d245d6-f9e3-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMWQyNDVkNi1mOWUzLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V52fSt9Ti26_Cwc_2X7EXptbaGNCGgSSSYOU1Mt0U4U=) Team,

Earlier this month, the White House doubled down on their promise to destroy programs like Social Security and Medicare.

**To no one's surprise, Scott Perry is sticking by the Administration’s plan, even as the earned benefits of millions of Americans -- including over 2.8 million Pennsylvanians -- are at risk.**

[**Sign our petition to tell Congress to stand up against these attacks on America’s seniors and hard-working families >> **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18795708/239814612/185454913?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMWQyNDVkNi1mOWUzLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V52fSt9Ti26_Cwc_2X7EXptbaGNCGgSSSYOU1Mt0U4U=&emci=0dfa6f62-cee3-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=21d245d6-f9e3-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&ceid=10203249) | [Protect these programs »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18795709/239814613/185454913?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMWQyNDVkNi1mOWUzLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V52fSt9Ti26_Cwc_2X7EXptbaGNCGgSSSYOU1Mt0U4U=&emci=0dfa6f62-cee3-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=21d245d6-f9e3-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&ceid=10203249)
---

When confronted about his record of voting to gut critical programs like Social Security and Medicare, Scott Perry pointed to the support he’s gained from a special interest group with a history of advocating for the privatization of Social Security.

**Scott Perry has no problem turning his back on South Central Pennsylvanians by undermining these critical programs.** In Congress, Eugene will fight day in and day out against any attempt to cut or privatize the earned benefits of PA seniors and hard working families.

[**Join us in calling for action to protect Social Security and Medicare by signing our petition now >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18795710/239814614/185454913?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMWQyNDVkNi1mOWUzLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V52fSt9Ti26_Cwc_2X7EXptbaGNCGgSSSYOU1Mt0U4U=&emci=0dfa6f62-cee3-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=21d245d6-f9e3-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&ceid=10203249) [Demand action now »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18795711/239814615/185454913?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMWQyNDVkNi1mOWUzLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V52fSt9Ti26_Cwc_2X7EXptbaGNCGgSSSYOU1Mt0U4U=&emci=0dfa6f62-cee3-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=21d245d6-f9e3-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&ceid=10203249)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: Unemployment Plummets
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
It was a busy week for your Indiana Republican Party and some of the biggest news came today as we learned our unemployment rate continues to plummet. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/statewide-airwaves-469662?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
|
---
| _**Unemployment Plummets**_
Exciting news to end a busy week! We learned this morning that Indiana's unemployment rate continues to plummet. Our rate is now 7.8%, 2.4% below the national average. Governor Holcomb is getting Indiana Back on Track and Hoosiers are getting back to work. Earlier this week, during a statewide address, Governor Holcomb announced initiatives that will enhance equity and inclusion in our state. The governor’s ongoing commitment to these issues shows, once again, that he’s dedicated to building One Indiana for All. You can read more about the speech below. Our Lt. Governor, Suzanne Crouch, did us proud earlier this week when she won her debate against the Democrat and Libertarian lt. governor candidates. Indiana farmers and rural residents couldn’t have a better champion in their corner than Suzanne. Her knowledge, experience, and passion for these issues were on full display. Congratulations Suzanne! Less than a week after we welcomed Hobart Mayor Brian Snedecor to our party, Lowell Town Council President, and now former Democrat, Mike Gruszka joined our party as well! He cited the far leftward tilt of today’s Democrats as a reason for his switch. We’re happy to have you join and our welcome mat is always out for more disaffected Democrats! All these great things were happening while the bedrock of our party, our grassroots supporters, continue to demonstrate why we’re going to win big this November. Hundreds of GOP volunteers canvassed the state, knocking doors for President Trump, Governor Holcomb, Todd Rokita, and all our Republican candidates up and down the ballot. Our energy and enthusiasm can’t be matched!

Thank you for all you do to support this party.

-Chairman Kyle Hupfer
---
|
---
| | **Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=6452449c6d&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| **_Opportunity For All_** Earlier this week, **Governor Holcomb **delivered a [thoughtful, open, and groundbreaking speech on equity and inclusion in Indiana](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=6e43122be9&e=1acd9bb3d6). After months of speaking with Black leaders and stakeholders statewide – _including business owners, college presidents, law enforcement, corporate executives, church leaders, and everyday citizens_ – **Governor Holcomb** laid out a plan that addresses the root causes of inequity and takes action to promote equality, inclusion, and opportunity for all. _**“What I’ve laid out today are the first steps in a broad effort to make sure Indiana is a place where every Hoosier has an equal opportunity to achieve our founders’ vision of ‘Life, Liberty and that pursuit of Happiness.’” – Gov. Holcomb**_
[\--> Click here to watch the full speech ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=c7e7e10b19&e=1acd9bb3d6)[<\--](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=444260f4d2&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
|
---
|
---
| **_Lt. Governor Crouch wins Agriculture Debate_** On Wednesday Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch debated the other LG candidates and promoted the Holcomb-Crouch record on agriculture and rural affairs. Suzanne won this one going away and highlighted the many agricultural accomplishments of the team over the last four years. This includes:
* $100 million investment in high-speed, affordable rural broadband access
* Expanding state parks, trails, forests, and natural resources
* Creating new healthcare options for farmers
* Assisting the agriculture industry in COVID-19 recovery
* Attracting more mid-level livestock processing plants, and more!

**[\--> Click here to watch the full debate <\--](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=d3bbdfc9bf&e=1acd9bb3d6)**
---
|
---
|
---
| _**Lowell Town Council President Newest Republican**_
“Today we’ve come to a point that the progressive left has gone so far left that they don’t share my beliefs anymore,” said Lowell Town Council President Mike Gruska when announcing his party switch. Welcome to the GOP Mike!
[\--> Click here for the full story <\--](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=9278a75014&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
|
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=79addaeb2a&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| _**It's a Sign! Get Your Holcomb Yard Sign Now**_ Fresh off the presses, **Governor Holcomb’s **yard signs are in! There's no better way to show your support than a yard sign for everyone to see! We’ve had a team busy assembling them, and they’re currently on their way to communities across our state.

If you're interested in a yard sign, click the link below to _sign up_! [\--> Click here to get your Holcomb yard sign <\--](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=5f2e9295e4&e=1acd9bb3d6)

clean_body: It was a busy week for your Indiana Republican Party and some of the biggest news came today as we learned our unemployment rate continues to plummet. | | | | | | | Unemployment Plummets Exciting news to end a busy week! We learned this morning that Indiana's unemployment rate continues to plummet. Our rate is now 7.8%, 2.4% below the national average. Governor Holcomb is getting Indiana Back on Track and Hoosiers are getting back to work. Earlier this week, during a statewide address, Governor Holcomb announced initiatives that will enhance equity and inclusion in our state. The governor’s ongoing commitment to these issues shows, once again, that he’s dedicated to building One Indiana for All. You can read more about the speech below. Our Lt. Governor, Suzanne Crouch, did us proud earlier this week when she won her debate against the Democrat and Libertarian lt. governor candidates. Indiana farmers and rural residents couldn’t have a better champion in their corner than Suzanne. Her knowledge, experience, and passion for these issues were on full display. Congratulations Suzanne! Less than a week after we welcomed Hobart Mayor Brian Snedecor to our party, Lowell Town Council President, and now former Democrat, Mike Gruszka joined our party as well! He cited the far leftward tilt of today’s Democrats as a reason for his switch. We’re happy to have you join and our welcome mat is always out for more disaffected Democrats! All these great things were happening while the bedrock of our party, our grassroots supporters, continue to demonstrate why we’re going to win big this November. Hundreds of GOP volunteers canvassed the state, knocking doors for President Trump, Governor Holcomb, Todd Rokita, and all our Republican candidates up and down the ballot. Our energy and enthusiasm can’t be matched! Thank you for all you do to support this party. -Chairman Kyle Hupfer | | | Governor Holcomb's Week That Was | | Opportunity For All Earlier this week, Governor Holcomb delivered a . After months of speaking with Black leaders and stakeholders statewide – including business owners, college presidents, law enforcement, corporate executives, church leaders, and everyday citizens – Governor Holcomb laid out a plan that addresses the root causes of inequity and takes action to promote equality, inclusion, and opportunity for all. “What I’ve laid out today are the first steps in a broad effort to make sure Indiana is a place where every Hoosier has an equal opportunity to achieve our founders’ vision of ‘Life, Liberty and that pursuit of Happiness.’” – Gov. Holcomb | | | Lt. Governor Crouch wins Agriculture Debate On Wednesday Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch debated the other LG candidates and promoted the Holcomb-Crouch record on agriculture and rural affairs. Suzanne won this one going away and highlighted the many agricultural accomplishments of the team over the last four years. This includes: $100 million investment in high-speed, affordable rural broadband access Expanding state parks, trails, forests, and natural resources Creating new healthcare options for farmers Assisting the agriculture industry in COVID-19 recovery Attracting more mid-level livestock processing plants, and more! | | | Lowell Town Council President Newest Republican “Today we’ve come to a point that the progressive left has gone so far left that they don’t share my beliefs anymore,” said Lowell Town Council President Mike Gruska when announcing his party switch. Welcome to the GOP Mike! | | | It's a Sign! Get Your Holcomb Yard Sign Now Fresh off the presses, Governor Holcomb’s yard signs are in! There's no better way to show your support than a yard sign for everyone to see! We’ve had a team busy assembling them, and they’re currently on their way to communities across our state. If you're interested in a yard sign, click the link below to sign up! | | | Upcoming Events : Adams County GOP 5th Annual Benjamin Harrison Breakfast : Reagan Day Dinner : Patriotic Rally to Honor Servicemen : Warren County Republican Patriot Day Golf Outing : BBQ with the Blue : Wells County Lincoln Day Dinner & Reagan Rally : 9th Annual Chairman's GOP Rally and Cookout : White County Lincoln Dinner : Brown County Lincoln Day Dinner : Knox County Annual Spot Shoot : Orange County GOP Annual Fall Dinner : Kosciusko County Republican Fall Fish Fry : Lincoln-Reagan Fall Dinner : Adams County Lincoln Day Dinner Have an event to add? Please email it to mailto:info@indiana.gop! | | News You Can Use Governor Eric Holcomb Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch Senator Todd Young Senator Mike Braun Congresswoman Jackie Walorski Congressman Jim Banks Congressman Jim Baird Congresswoman Susan Brooks Congressman Greg Pence Congressman Larry Bucshon Congressman Trey Hollingsworth | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2020 Indiana Republican State Committee, Inc., All rights reserved.

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: My speech from Wednesday night
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
I was honored to address the Democratic National Convention on Wednesday night from the Early Childhood Education Center in Springfield, Massachusetts. In case you didn't get a chance to watch it, her | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852505d/45c30650/1c26faf7b/66e83f81/29848416/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
I was honored to address the Democratic National Convention on Wednesday from the Early Childhood Education Center in Springfield, Massachusetts.

**[In case you didn't get a chance to watch it, here's a link to the video, and you can scroll down to read the full text.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852505d/45c30650/1c26faf7b/66e83f80/29848416/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLWF1ZzIwZnItZG5jYyIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1VMTBGX0VHUl9TQ0hfRV8yMDIwMDgyMF9WMVMxX1AifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-aug20fr-dncc?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMU10F_EGR_SCH_E_20200820_V1S1_P&noskip=true")**

You know, I never thought I'd run for office -- not in a zillion years. And I never thought I'd speak at a big political convention.

But I realized that it was a way to keep up the fight for a country that works for everyone, not just the rich and powerful. And that fight has never been more critical.

We must do everything we can to elect Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, and Democrats across the country this November. And I'm honored to be in this fight by your side.

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

\--

Tonight we've heard from the people who make America work, people who put their lives on the line to keep our country going, and since COVID-19 hit, they've taken one gut punch after another.

And what has the COVID fallout done to our babies? I'm here at the Early Childhood Education Center in Springfield, Massachusetts, which has been closed for months. Childcare was already hard to find before the pandemic. And now, parents are stuck -- no idea when schools can safely reopen and even fewer childcare options.

The devastation is enormous. And the way I see it: big problems demand big solutions.

I love a good plan, and Joe Biden has some really good plans -- plans to bring back union jobs in manufacturing and create new union jobs in clean energy. Plans to increase Social Security benefits, cancel billions in student loan debt, and make our bankruptcy laws work for families instead of the creditors who cheat them.

These plans reflect a central truth: our economic system has been rigged to give bailouts to billionaires and kick dirt in the face of everyone else. But we can build a thriving economy by investing in families and fixing what's broken. Joe's plan to "build back better" includes making the wealthy pay their fair share, holding corporations accountable, repairing racial inequities, and fighting corruption in Washington.

Let me tell you about one of Joe's plans that's especially close to my heart: childcare.

As a little girl growing up in Oklahoma, what I wanted most in the world was to be a teacher.

I loved teaching. When I had babies and was juggling my first big teaching job down in Texas, it was hard. But I could do hard. The thing that almost sank me? Childcare.

One night my Aunt Bee called to check in. I thought I was fine, but then I just broke down and started to cry. I had tried holding it all together, but without reliable childcare, working was nearly impossible. And when I told Aunt Bee I was going to quit my job, I thought my heart would break.

Then she said the words that changed my life: "I can't get there tomorrow, but I'll come on Thursday." She arrived with seven suitcases and a Pekingese named Buddy and stayed for 16 years. I get to be here tonight because of my Aunt Bee.

I learned a fundamental truth: nobody makes it on their own.

And yet, two generations of working parents later, if you have a baby and don't have an Aunt Bee, you're on your own.

And here's why that's wrong: We build infrastructure like roads, bridges and communications systems so that people can work.

That infrastructure helps us all because it keeps our economy going. It's time to recognize that childcare is part of the basic infrastructure of this nation -- it's infrastructure for families.

Joe and Kamala will make high-quality child care affordable for every family, make preschool universal, and raise the wages for every child care worker.

That's just one plan, but it gives you an idea of how we get this country working for everyone.

Donald Trump's ignorance and incompetence have always been a danger to our country. COVID-19 was Trump's biggest test. He failed miserably. Today, America has the most COVID deaths in the world and an economic collapse -- and both crises are falling hardest on Black and Brown families.

Millions out of work. Millions more trapped in cycles of poverty. Millions on the brink of losing their homes. Millions of restaurants and stores hanging by a thread.

This crisis is bad -- and didn't have to be this way. This crisis is on Donald Trump and the Republicans who enable him. On November 3, we hold them all accountable.

So, whether you're planning to vote wearing a mask or vote by mail, please, take out your phone right now and text VOTE to 30330.

We all need to be in the fight to get Joe and Kamala elected. And after November, we all need to stay in the fight to get big things done.

We stay in this fight so that when our children and our grandchildren ask what we did during this dark chapter in our nation's history, we will be able to look them squarely in the eye and say: we organized, we persisted, and we changed America.

| **Elizabeth needs your help to elect Democrats up and down the ballot this year.**If a donation makes sense, chip in $2 or whatever you can right now and let's make big, structural change a reality.**

| [**DONATE NOW**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852505d/45c30650/1c26faf7b/66e83f83/29848416/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLWF1ZzIwZnItZG5jYyIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1VMTBGX0VHUl9TQ0hfRV8yMDIwMDgyMF9WMVMxX1AifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-aug20fr-dncc?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMU10F_EGR_SCH_E_20200820_V1S1_P")
---
**
| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852505d/45c30650/1c26faf7b/66e83f82/29848416/VEsC/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.facebook.com/ElizabethWarren/") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852505d/45c30650/1c26faf7b/66e83f85/29848416/VEsD/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://twitter.com/ewarren") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852505d/45c30650/1c26faf7b/66e83f84/29848416/VEsA/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.instagram.com/elizabethwarren/") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852505d/45c30650/1c26faf7b/66e83f87/29848416/VEsB/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCrj-0FxK19tgUR2EbHkBBGg/videos") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852505d/45c30650/1c26faf7b/66e83f86/29848416/VEsO/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.flickr.com/photos/elizabethwarren") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852505d/45c30650/1c26faf7b/66e83f89/29848416/VEsP/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://medium.com/@teamwarren")

| | Starting today, we're launching an extensive postcard campaign to reach as many voters as possible in IL-16, and we have big goals.**We need to send out over 45,000 postcards to voters, and we need your help to make it happen. **

Not only will this postcard campaign help us win this race, but we'll also be spending thousands of dollars at the post office and help **#SaveUSPS.** $3.50 helps us reach 10 voters. [Can you chip in $3.50 today and help us get these postcards out to the voters?](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=d5877a06d4&e=140a9b81e7)

Campaigning during a pandemic makes efforts like our postcard campaign more important than ever. We can't attend large events to greet voters or send out hundreds of door knockers to have conversations, but we can make sure the voters get our message this way. **Your donation will help lead us to victory. **

We are excited to launch this postcard campaign, but we know it will only work if we can raise the money to get it done. [**Chip in today, help to #SaveUSPS, and help lead us to victory in November.**](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=c677c650bb&e=140a9b81e7)

Dani Brzozowski
Democratic Nominee for Congress, IL-16

clean_body: | | | | | | | Starting today, we're launching an extensive postcard campaign to reach as many voters as possible in IL-16, and we have big goals.We need to send out over 45,000 postcards to voters, and we need your help to make it happen. Not only will this postcard campaign help us win this race, but we'll also be spending thousands of dollars at the post office and help #SaveUSPS. $3.50 helps us reach 10 voters. Campaigning during a pandemic makes efforts like our postcard campaign more important than ever. We can't attend large events to greet voters or send out hundreds of door knockers to have conversations, but we can make sure the voters get our message this way. Your donation will help lead us to victory. We are excited to launch this postcard campaign, but we know it will only work if we can raise the money to get it done. Dani Brzozowski Democratic Nominee for Congress, IL-16 | "Donate here!" | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Paid for by Dani for Illinois | | Our mailing address is: Dani for Illinois PO Box 1671 LaSalle, IL 61301 Want to change how you receive these emails? body:
|
