| | Hi Peter -- while Sen. Cornyn is running a campaign fueled by corporate PACs and special interests who also fund the Koch network, **MJ is counting on grassroots donors** to power our movement to beat him! And as we draw closer to November, **[your support is more important than ever.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e12/7f51f7bc/43c0c753/4ef7d557/2613310813/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5NTMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200821.2nd__1953__&amount=10")**

We appreciate every dollar this team gives, and we want to make sure you know what we do with your donations. | **$5 pays for 500 text messages.**
**([Donate $5!](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e12/7f51f7bc/43c0c753/4ef7d556/2613310813/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5NTMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200821.2nd__1953__&amount=5"))**

**$10 gets an online ad in front of 2,000 people.**
**([Donate $10!](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e12/7f51f7bc/43c0c753/4ef7d557/2613310813/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5NTMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200821.2nd__1953__&amount=10"))**

**$24 pays for one month of our organizing software.**
**([Donate $24!](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e12/7f51f7bc/43c0c753/4ef7d555/2613310813/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5NTMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200821.2nd__1953__&amount=24"))**

**$50 pays for bilingual captioning for a town hall.**
**([Donate $50!](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e12/7f51f7bc/43c0c753/4ef7d554/2613310813/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5NTMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200821.2nd__1953__&amount=50"))**
---
It all adds up, and **every dollar gets us one step closer to defeating Sen. Cornyn** on Election Day. This is a grassroots powered campaign, so we need your help if we're going to flip Texas and the Senate!

**Make your first* grassroots donation today to help MJ _win_ this November!**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $5>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e12/7f51f7bc/43c0c753/4ef7d54b/2613310813/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5NTMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200821.2nd__1953__&amount=5")**
**[Express donate $10>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e12/7f51f7bc/43c0c753/4ef7d54a/2613310813/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5NTMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200821.2nd__1953__&amount=10")**
**[Express donate $25>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e12/7f51f7bc/43c0c753/4ef7d549/2613310813/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5NTMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200821.2nd__1953__&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e12/7f51f7bc/43c0c753/4ef7d548/2613310813/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5NTMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200821.2nd__1953__&amount=50")**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e12/7f51f7bc/43c0c753/4ef7d54f/2613310813/VEsHBA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5NTMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200821.2nd__1953__")**
Thanks,
Team MJ

_*If you've already contributed to the campaign, thank you so much! Our records are based on donations associated with this email address in our online database, which may take some time to update._

[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e12/7f51f7bc/43c0c753/4ef7d557/2613310813/VEsHBw/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5NTMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200821.2nd__1953__&amount=10")

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e12/7f51f7bc/43c0c753/4ef7d54e/2613310813/VEsHBg/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5NTMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1953&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e12/7f51f7bc/43c0c753/4ef7d54d/2613310813/VEsHAQ/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.

#ICYMI this week on Spicer&Co:
* Kim Klacik’s congressional ad addresses real issues in Baltimore and goes viral (https://youtu.be/_GS5fYMXtio?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=28bef64929-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_08_20_08_07&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-28bef64929-68212193)
* Congresswoman Elise Stefanik reacts to the DNC convention (https://youtu.be/g812Ehv1VY8?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=28bef64929-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_08_20_08_07&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-28bef64929-68212193)
* Leo Terrell discusses the black vote and how Kamala Harris will impact it (https://youtu.be/Vz9dE-yM53o?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=28bef64929-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_08_20_08_07&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-28bef64929-68212193)
* Former Governor Rick Scott breaks down night 3 of the DNC convention (https://youtu.be/lGF1gAhOm5M?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=28bef64929-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_08_20_08_07&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-28bef64929-68212193)

Coming up next week on Spicer&Co:
* Rep Jim Jordan
* Rep. Martha McSally
* Former Governor Sarah Palin
* Matt Schlapp
* Rep. Mike Burgess
* Katrina Pierson and more!

Leading America Update

I'm finishing up the final edits on my manuscript this week and getting closer to the release of my second book, "Leading America". I'm looking forward to it's release and you all reading it.

I take a deep dive into my journey on Dancing with the Stars and some of my experiences with the media, education, big tech and corporate America since leaving the White House. It's even more clear to me now that President Trump's policies are what we need to move our country forward.

It comes out October 13, 2020, but I would appreciate your support in pre-ordering it now!

Pre-order it now here (https://www.amazon.com/Leading-America-Commitment-Patriotism-Capitalism-ebook/dp/B084MDY19D/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=leading+america&qid=1588613239&sr=8-1&utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=3e679cbd12-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_07_30_06_30&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-3e679cbd12-&utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=28bef64929-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_08_20_08_07&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-28bef64929-68212193) .

Thanks,

Sean

name: Jay Inslee
subject: I left the presidential race a year ago today
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
It was the start of something much bigger.
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/379?t=2&akid=2337%2E53494%2EB2D4gT) Friend, On August 21, 2019 -- a year ago today -- I left the presidential race. In some ways, that's when Evergreen Action started: My former team has been running with what we built together ever since. When I broke the news that I was ending my presidential run, I vowed that we would fight to get our gold-standard plan for climate action adopted by the Democratic Party and the next president. In fact, I made that plan open source and called on any nominee to adopt it in full. It's been heartening and humbling to watch you all continue that mission and spread my plans far and wide. While I won't be in the White House next year, I know our work and our mission will continue. Bold climate plans that include the policies I have worked and campaigned on must be part of the next presidential administration. Evergreen Action has much more work to do to ensure that happens. **[If you supported an all-out national mobilization to beat the climate crisis a year ago and still do, donate today to Evergreen to help keep up the momentum on bold climate action.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/759?t=3&akid=2337%2E53494%2EB2D4gT)** In the past year, Joe Biden has moved to embrace our shared vision. His latest climate plans call for major new investments in a clean energy-led economic recovery. They propose robust federal standards, like achieving 100% clean electricity by 2035, to power future growth with renewable energy. And they are grounded in a deep commitment to environmental justice by holding polluters accountable. But more work needs to be done. We need to convince all policymakers the truth of what I've always believed: Climate is a winning issue. I cannot wait to see what we accomplish together from our joint commitment and efforts in the year to come. **[If you can, continue to support this work with a donation today to Evergreen Action -- they are keeping our climate fight going.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/759?t=4&akid=2337%2E53494%2EB2D4gT)** When I left the presidential race, I did so knowing that the campaign we built together was the start of something much bigger. **Thank you for proving me right.** Very truly yours, Jay | [DONATE ](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/759?t=5&akid=2337%2E53494%2EB2D4gT)
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](https://act.evergreenaction.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=2337%2E53494%2EB2D4gT). Contributions or gifts to EVERGREEN ACTION are not tax deductible. | PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
---

name: Chris Jacobs
subject: What do you stand for?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JACOBS FOR CONGRESS [Unsubscribe](http://sendy
body:
|
---
Friend, Did you watch the Democratic (Socialism) National Convention? In sharing their "vision" for 2020 they had AOC, Bernie Sanders, and Andrew Cuomo join in to discuss their radical ideas to move America backwards, weaken our law enforcement, and raise your taxes. [Joe Biden opposes helping to fully fund our police.](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/VScGD0L7wmXZ0Y7LsIuIrg/y892ymmgBWp4T24lSItwB9Wg) And yes, [Joe Biden has actually pledged to raise your taxes if elected president.](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/efgM76IcMtpoUC3VPzrIyA/y892ymmgBWp4T24lSItwB9Wg) They have officially left America behind and are moving toward a new plan of socialism....and they are not even trying to hide it. 2020 presents a major choice - but the democrats are making it easier than ever. My own opponent, Nate McMurray, tweeted this week that he was proud to vote for Bernie Sanders and he has endorsed Biden. With the unrest on our streets, and the economic hardships many Americans are facing - we don't need any more elected officials from the far-left pledging to raise taxes and defund police - we have too many already. That's why I am proud of my message to rebuild our economy, restore safety to our streets, and renew faith in the American dream - and I'm not just talking about it. I am working every single day in Congress to carry out this commitment and I promise to keep fighting until we return our economy to historic levels. [If you're tired of Democrats letting criminals deface our nation and disgrace our constitution chip in $10, $25, or $50 today so we can send them a clear message that we love our nation and we are going to keep fighting for the American way of life we know and love.](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/Ca21v1hx9W8V45R3rB892BlQ/y892ymmgBWp4T24lSItwB9Wg) I can't do this without dedicated patriots like you, and together we are going to make sure we elect a leader who will fight for the economic growth and prosperity Western New Yorkers deserve. Sincerely,
Chris Jacobs

name: Miryam Lipper, Communications Director
subject: Kamala and me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
Joe and Kamala will need Jon in the Senate |
---
Friend,

Wednesday was surreal for me.

Before I came to work for Jon Ossoff in Georgia, I was Kamala Harris' Communications Director in Iowa. We spent all of 2019 driving through every corner of the state, introducing voters to Kamala and her career of fighting for the people.

_My favorite moments were the quiet ones Kamala had along the rope line with young children, particularly young girls, telling them about the future we could build together._ [](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e25c8/5b2c1286/3f7eae55/25f052bd/1839954854/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_21_ml_kh?refcode=em_2020_08_21_ml_kh&amount=20") **Seeing Kamala on that stage Wednesday night, I knew little girls all across the country were watching her and thinking about how someone who looked just like them could do anything, even be the next Vice President of the United States.**

Friend, we always knew what was at stake in this election, but boy did we not know what 2020 would bring.

**I was so proud last month when Kamala endorsed Jon in his race. I know Kamala sees in Jon what so many of us do.**

Besides sharing a deep love of family, they both have a higher calling to public service and are tireless fighters against corruption and injustice.

We need fresh leadership, people who understand how to unify the country and get rid of corrupt politics as usual. As Kamala said Wednesday, "We can do better and deserve so much more."

Jon just gets it, and he would be an incredible asset to the United States Senate and representative for the state of Georgia.

And most importantly, in order for Kamala Harris and Joe Biden to implement their bold agenda, they are going to need a Democratic Senate.

And that starts with electing Jon in Georgia.

I know Kamala, Joe, and Jon are doing everything they can until Election Day, but we need you to join us.

**[Right now, will you make a donation to elect Jon in Georgia and give Kamala and Joe a Senate majority?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e25c8/5b2c1286/3f7eae55/25f052bc/1839954854/VEsE/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_21_ml_kh?refcode=em_2020_08_21_ml_kh")**

clean_body: Joe and Kamala will need Jon in the Senate | Friend, Wednesday was surreal for me. Before I came to work for Jon Ossoff in Georgia, I was Kamala Harris' Communications Director in Iowa. We spent all of 2019 driving through every corner of the state, introducing voters to Kamala and her career of fighting for the people. My favorite moments were the quiet ones Kamala had along the rope line with young children, particularly young girls, telling them about the future we could build together. "" Seeing Kamala on that stage Wednesday night, I knew little girls all across the country were watching her and thinking about how someone who looked just like them could do anything, even be the next Vice President of the United States. Friend, we always knew what was at stake in this election, but boy did we not know what 2020 would bring. I was so proud last month when Kamala endorsed Jon in his race. I know Kamala sees in Jon what so many of us do. Besides sharing a deep love of family, they both have a higher calling to public service and are tireless fighters against corruption and injustice. We need fresh leadership, people who understand how to unify the country and get rid of corrupt politics as usual. As Kamala said Wednesday, "We can do better and deserve so much more." Jon just gets it, and he would be an incredible asset to the United States Senate and representative for the state of Georgia. And most importantly, in order for Kamala Harris and Joe Biden to implement their bold agenda, they are going to need a Democratic Senate. And that starts with electing Jon in Georgia. I know Kamala, Joe, and Jon are doing everything they can until Election Day, but we need you to join us. "" If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" Thank you for standing with my friends, Kamala and Jon. Miryam Lipper Communications Director Jon Ossoff for U.S. Senate | This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com "" | "" | P.O. Box 450326, Atlanta, GA 31145 PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE

You might think that with Joe Biden at the top of the ticket, Democrats’ sole target is the White House in November. While they’re more fired up th Peter, You might think that with Joe Biden at the top of the ticket, Democrats’ sole target is the White House in November.
While they’re more fired up than ever to win back the presidency, they have their eyes on a prize just as enticing: the U.S. Senate majority.
And let me tell you one thing, Peter... They won’t stop until they flip it blue.
Joe Biden knows how important the state of Ohio is for his White House run, but he’s also investing in swing states all across the nation, trying to flip GOP seats and hand Chuck Schumer the majority.
That’s why I’m committed to promoting the conservative cause all across the U.S... I’m doing everything I can to defend EVERY conservative U.S. Senate seat. And I need your help.

I’m counting on you now more than ever. Thank you, Peter.

Win Ohio and you win the presidency... it’s almost as simple as that.
So it’s no surprise that Joe Biden and the Washington establishment is going to be investing HEAVILY into flipping our state.
I can’t tell you how much they’ll spend. I can’t tell you when it will ramp up. But I can tell you one thing, Peter...
Ohio will be a number-one target from right now, all the way to November 3.
They’ll spend big to make sure that Democrats from every corner of our state turn out in big numbers, not only to put Biden in the White House, but to flip the U.S. Senate in the process nationally.
Peter, if there’s ever been an all-important time to defend our conservative values in Ohio – it’s now. And that’s what I need your help with.

body:
| | | Quick update — With only a few hours until midnight, we still need another 89 donors to close a budget deficit for our critical Voter Outreach Fund. A donation right now will go straight to helping us make sure we Get Out The Vote in every corner of the district.

Here’s the link to rush a secure donation: [**_https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gd_voter_outreach_**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y7dsrz2F0E6jwuVr-pzf6bgtnT7c1rkZPjUMvYuhXWvQzeeN3OnHYQ6aaajYspasdUmuuudEYkg6TcOXMm50I-DjK89gKKPe1iWeG91fLwI7hy7I4dHYdX-DvZO5aGR48-R28xRMsh2gjJvp1wtuV7bngnjvgj-bWMASfUKmCXKBe1oZ8iIE0Wa3eFk-zm4JEwqoHZsp-3iq-ZPZkDlL0OhVfNQ4AOXNzSg5TQRlgi0KX3YnYeJbkHCaVm4TCSq--N5x3Yd0tB7HI5x6NZE1DHUGTDvbEwKHvwhPrcg9WYrRO3VOKlrSKhO49Xw1VwsSAmrq5FVno73q40T70HFIknwyGKPGZTlN6AdDoUkceXBw/34i/ERNeyO3RQuG3S20CF38YUA/h0/FXSQAPzaNbe8zG5fgrHXWxx_hMflr6yhjuZtSMf0ntY)

With the Democratic National Convention coming to an end, everyone is energized and ready to go, but one thing became clear this week. **The fate of our country is at stake and we MUST get Every. Single. Vote. to win.**

We’ve seen just the tip of the iceberg of the lengths Republicans will go to divide us and actively suppress the vote. We have to be able to fight back, but our campaign is facing a deficit that we must close before the weekend hits to keep our voter outreach numbers on track.

Can I count on you to help us, right now?

[**_https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gd_voter_outreach_**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y7dsrz2F0E6jwuVr-pzf6bgtnT7c1rkZPjUMvYuhXWvQzeeN3OnHYQ6aaajYspasdUmuuudEYkg6TcOXMm50I-DjK89gKKPe1iWeG91fLwI8UC9Xr6Pt1SyB3u3qJzlbNk2hzMlhr0zX_SsCA4IUSHeyh2OVdefma8Z6V24aHzvzX0Rq89FJl4gDuoe4bwbWcNsJGueYDENCsW_qoYRRadcPCW2MihlgJATaCefWJQdSxNyOqNpoJ5yxhBYaXBp-SEVysbB4-ffAnkqHJR6JHKlWDiabVB-hmMfjrkmFb_ta8-v7qmNVZsufvT3UmgeXfyv3vRW1iaje7KJkcDR7oN3WCLIyzDqXOSmvwTc341zg/34i/ERNeyO3RQuG3S20CF38YUA/h1/DFkpMOl9Xffu-tPKDT8qQf_JH8xQOn9PZggIjtsgguY)

Thank you for all of your hard work. We couldn’t do it without you!

Gretchen

Gretchen Driskell is running for Congress in Michigan's 7th district against incumbent Tim Walberg. As a nonpartisan mayor, Gretchen had to balance the budget, make tough decisions, and deliver results for people in our community. In Congress, she will bring that same leadership and start getting things done for all of us, here in Michigan.

**[Please support Gretchen's campaign with a contribution here.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xp4wiH7fPGufypAf7vbw11_ulQcCJTmIsFp5wUEoq8HntrizDN8iwrqhzObcDx44m-9cVTrSa5YJv8HkyUhrNv082RCIKLuNrmcr8qn5_sLXZ9YGEbZ3IPrfKtc1KQ1CWGrdPkBTOAdcY8WHOEcJhnusZTxw46rLa2E_8c7V0TB6NYelJtexUNo0QyX3RLcO7-jijOqLZgZe_Tf_ZlZAkO8cRKq-6aZcn2GN-il6o2Tzr4qdmRs9yOFNkkpYdXpxlU0fW-sJ129LwH1fkSHV7fstjJrzsaNGhP-2MfQ6bS7tk5iDzCcoWw6zpiRUfbuT0/34i/ERNeyO3RQuG3S20CF38YUA/h3/oDltwE_gfSHCXaQ4Cpyaa-VWukNLa-JZGa6LznUj5n4)**

clean_body: | | | Quick update — With only a few hours until midnight, we still need another 89 donors to close a budget deficit for our critical Voter Outreach Fund. A donation right now will go straight to helping us make sure we Get Out The Vote in every corner of the district. Here’s the link to rush a secure donation: With the Democratic National Convention coming to an end, everyone is energized and ready to go, but one thing became clear this week. The fate of our country is at stake and we MUST get Every. Single. Vote. to win. We’ve seen just the tip of the iceberg of the lengths Republicans will go to divide us and actively suppress the vote. We have to be able to fight back, but our campaign is facing a deficit that we must close before the weekend hits to keep our voter outreach numbers on track. Can I count on you to help us, right now? Thank you for all of your hard work. We couldn’t do it without you! Gretchen Paid for by Gretchen Driskell for Congress Gretchen Driskell is running for Congress in Michigan's 7th district against incumbent Tim Walberg. As a nonpartisan mayor, Gretchen had to balance the budget, make tough decisions, and deliver results for people in our community. In Congress, she will bring that same leadership and start getting things done for all of us, here in Michigan. | | Sent via . name: =?utf-8?Q?Outvote?=
subject: 10 quotable moments from this week's #DemConvention
body:
Plus the latest from this week in democracy. | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/outvote.io/august-21-20?e=0aad15100c)
---
| _Organizing for everyone._
---
| | | |
---
|
---
|
**This Week in Democracy:**

---
| [ ](https://outvote.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc952a46675058f5f7e2d3a0a&id=2de70380d7&e=0aad15100c)
---

The last 12+ months of the Democratic primary all led up to this: former Vice President Joe Biden and Senator Kamala Harris were officially nominated this week as the party's presidential and vice presidential candidates. The Democratic Convention was energizing and inspiring: [our latest blog post](https://outvote.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc952a46675058f5f7e2d3a0a&id=b80ab8c694&e=0aad15100c) covers 10 quotable moments from the four days of speeches and appearances.

| [Read the Recap](https://outvote.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc952a46675058f5f7e2d3a0a&id=2901366cd6&e=0aad15100c "Read the Recap")
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| | | | **What We're Reading:**

---
| [ ](https://outvote.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc952a46675058f5f7e2d3a0a&id=676b790ed0&e=0aad15100c)
---
[**Biden's Big Moment**](https://outvote.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc952a46675058f5f7e2d3a0a&id=a3b23d4ab2&e=0aad15100c)

_8.21.20 | The New York Times_ Biden's speech lays the path to November.

[ ](https://outvote.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc952a46675058f5f7e2d3a0a&id=f2daeabcb5&e=0aad15100c)
---
[**Who Holds the Key to a New America?**](https://outvote.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc952a46675058f5f7e2d3a0a&id=a2d5dd3df6&e=0aad15100c)

_8.11.20 | The New York Times_ Low-income voter turnout is key to a Democratic victory.
|
---
|
---
|
**What You Can Do: **

---
| | [ ](https://outvote.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc952a46675058f5f7e2d3a0a&id=dd744ded0b&e=0aad15100c)
---
[Ask your senators to ensure that the Census Bureau receives an extension](https://outvote.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc952a46675058f5f7e2d3a0a&id=3c296426c7&e=0aad15100c) to conduct a fair, accurate Census: we want to make sure everyone is counted this year.
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
### **“Y****ears from now, this moment will have passed and our children and our grandchildren will look in our eyes and they’re going to ask us, ‘Where were you when the stakes were so high?’ They will ask us, ‘What was it like?’ **
We will tell them not just how we felt. We will tell them what we did."
******\- Senator and Vice Presidential Nominee Kamala Harris**
DNC Keynote Speech, 8.19.20

|

name: Nancy
subject: re: where is he hiding?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Mace for Congress |
body:
Must be nice to campaign ENTIRELY on the taxpayer dime while you vote nearly 90% of the time with Nancy Pelosi in Washington. That’s exactly what... [ ](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=ea5faadc1c6a46b081cfa321dbc5d4c5&_e=ZQR_PQrnmVB3hQRuf7EL7-ILFblSO2zapbJbBvUC_KhjLYSqGnD0cBefqJ6WuWsGUV2Mcxf0Y1hwBYhod4cnQP52nq4Sltl-9FhqfJS-BcoBNFp-gjKx0vd1aM_OZWhclp3jwo4asvaEWJ00elt6h_DENzlgxFDQcifzpe4PTzNKRUr3Q6SUIix57zxx3UYmCd2yHbGKkbVjIhvPEAlv_2c5moSDA9cNlT2rTeETIBfPhGZCfcAH7-6dy2WFahYHskZ9VQFAm09PU--3R-c8XdIVjXjYhVYcig0IvhW9wnZUJnQ3ABkjA68Id1tyHjyabxgr4jqCmdGAC3sWnR2jPFcSnszcvkF7MZSkw_Bgp6vV60iCxpfKSEWSvVIsrWv_XWIy6RlD1KMFZfRrwzG6xUesoKfaCZzlL6u55-Z4XL4%3D) | |
---
Friend,

Must be nice to campaign ENTIRELY on the taxpayer dime while you vote nearly 90% of the time with Nancy Pelosi in Washington.

_That’s exactly what Congressman Cunningham has been doing all year._

While he may have just confirmed 1 debate this morning, there are 4 more waiting for the Congressman’s RSVP.

I’m all in. It’s time for Congressman Joe Cunningham to commit to FIVE debates.

What is the Congressman doing instead of preparing for these debates? He’s using South Carolina taxpayers as a piggy bank to host town halls and reach voters on your dime.

It’s time to tell Congressman Cunningham to show up in South Carolina and I want you to join me to put the pressure on. Will you sign my petition today?
[**TELL CONGRESSMAN CUNNINGHAM: DEBATE AND DEFEND YOUR RECORD**](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=ea5faadc1c6a46b081cfa321dbc5d4c5&_e=ZQR_PQrnmVB3hQRuf7EL7-ILFblSO2zapbJbBvUC_KhjLYSqGnD0cBefqJ6WuWsGUV2Mcxf0Y1hwBYhod4cnQP52nq4Sltl-9FhqfJS-BcoBNFp-gjKx0vd1aM_OZWhclp3jwo4asvaEWJ00elt6h_DENzlgxFDQcifzpe4PTzNKRUr3Q6SUIix57zxx3UYmCd2yHbGKkbVjIhvPEAlv_56bqyumatRGiGmbEoUBrrevqFmBQzvJlPpdNDjqYvnlMWV4JLfOBzrS540EVcdPpjyZDMwKUjfo5bJ7UE8EdbVsmAi_len0ja_pZ2dz0jB-UhU_fXJXw7vanCmYG4oQ_CRxFcbmXwPDdGViOhbqr80x3cnr7PwW35p68yrNiRdT0RPVLlJ9IkLmFnCnC9dLU1gXG7AGZvVTSaHZVS3QTu8%3D)
When I first challenged Congressman Cunningham to five debates, he flat out ignored it.

_He has made clear that he would rather hide in Washington than defend his record to the people!**[SHOW UP CONGRESSMAN CUNNINGHAM: SIGN NOW>>](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=ea5faadc1c6a46b081cfa321dbc5d4c5&_e=ZQR_PQrnmVB3hQRuf7EL7-ILFblSO2zapbJbBvUC_KhjLYSqGnD0cBefqJ6WuWsGUV2Mcxf0Y1hwBYhod4cnQP52nq4Sltl-9FhqfJS-BcoBNFp-gjKx0vd1aM_OZWhclp3jwo4asvaEWJ00elt6h_DENzlgxFDQcifzpe4PTzNKRUr3Q6SUIix57zxx3UYmCd2yHbGKkbVjIhvPEAlv_xHOQ1xX0LJ3plRjmCoUwz6KuCLNRBYiVnKy6Sx-dxgO6qkHyTdQ8qnJnXKLrd32YbEPLb15bsKRrp52Rkx57sSo-vI4rzGJRytaXMq3T78apw186S2HQRTDuzXfXj-V-dGNiIisgnaPqWrL4zfZD8Y4lxr_ZKiLS--YlNRG-ttDblGxVpXMJTskaZ2p8VYXAOdjNiyRTPIZpqooxbes5WY%3D)**_

I guess this out of touch “campaigning” shouldn’t be too much of a surprise to anyone considering that he supports a huge spending bill that would provide congressional candidates with up to $5 MILLION in taxpayer funds that would cover campaign and **personal expenses.**

If that passed, he’d never have to leave Washington or answer to a single voter! And that’s exactly how he wants it!

But that’s not what the people of the Lowcountry want or deserve.

We want a real discussion, a real debate, and we deserve a member of Congress who won’t run from the conversation.

No scripts. No teleprompters. Just the facts.

**Join me today to tell Congressman Cunningham to put taxpayer-funded campaign events on hold and to SHOW UP in South Carolina:[https://secure.winred.com/nancymace/show-101464/](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=ea5faadc1c6a46b081cfa321dbc5d4c5&_e=ZQR_PQrnmVB3hQRuf7EL7-ILFblSO2zapbJbBvUC_KhjLYSqGnD0cBefqJ6WuWsGUV2Mcxf0Y1hwBYhod4cnQP52nq4Sltl-9FhqfJS-BcoBNFp-gjKx0vd1aM_OZWhclp3jwo4asvaEWJ00elt6h_DENzlgxFDQcifzpe4PTzNKRUr3Q6SUIix57zxx3UYmCd2yHbGKkbVjIhvPEAlv_5nLP3UE6jMg40DelBULbsq86d_-QoQ4s6vEKir4BhohNlyZDklNUdLZ9AUZgHAhH1_PaP4rl6g1oNw1rMyEaaxilnOQjlDhhgHKLVnpf0HC82L-I0pR5rnETpd-LAI8F7qH1xxGyCi0pvDeNZ49DJ8-iR0SRZbWDiBKtVpvHw-0duIDNygRTjeV-mK-gnUQh5oRodvPrCJpLyDUFUeojSo%3D)**

Thank you for your support,

Nancy Mace
---
---
| |
---
| Paid for by Nancy Mace for Congress |
| 295 Seven Farms Drive C-186 Charleston, SC 29492 |
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com |

name: Jaime Harrison
subject: I'm neck-and-neck with Lindsey Graham, everyone​, and I need your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
_"You can't do that."_
That's what I've been told every step of my life. You can't go to a college like Yale, can't get a law degree, can't become the first Black chair of the South Carolina Democratic Party.
Now, those who doubt me say I can't beat Lindsey Graham to become the next Senator from South Carolina -- but we're going to prove them wrong together, everyone. Just like I proved those naysayers wrong before: by putting in the work.
Grassroots donors helped me out-raise Lindsey Graham two quarters in a row, and **now we're neck-and-neck in the polls.** I need your support before we close the books on the Democratic convenion week -- the crucial next step towards winning this seat and flipping the Senate on Election Day.
Our party is just four seats away from turning the Senate blue -- from closing the chapter on Lindsey Graham, Mitch McConnell, and a Republican Senate that serves as a rubber stamp for Donald Trump and his special interests. By supporting my campaign and swing state Democrats like Senator Maggie Hassan, you'll help send one more Democratic leader to the Senate who will serve American families with progressive policies over stymied political interests, and secure a very vulnerable seat.
[**Help me win my race by closing out convention week strong. Split a $3 donation between my campaign for Senate and Maggie Hassan's before tonight's deadline.**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc5dc/2a380d31/2328f078/f0a223/2235230209/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0amgiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIwMDgyMV9NV0g0SGFycmlzb25fbmEiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4jh?refcode=e20200821_MWH4Harrison_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: A plan for every scenario
body:
Your RI COVID-19 News Update
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
As I've said from the beginning, every decision we make about reopening our schools will be guided by science and data. For us to determine whether it's safe for a district to open fully, we're looking at the number of COVID-19 in that municipality proportionate to its population. Once districts reopen, however, we'll be able to look at cases on a much more granular level - by school, and even by each stable pod. We know there will be positive cases in each district as the year goes on, just like we know there will be positive cases among adults. We can't completely eliminate the virus, but we can stop it from spreading by planning thoroughly for every possibility. This will allow us to be smart and targeted in how we manage those cases while preventing an outbreak and limiting the disruption in learning, just like we've done with child care. Today, I want to share with you our plans for responding to each possible scenario of COVID-19 cases in a school district.
---
|
---
| Scenario 1 means there's a very limited number of cases and they're contained within a stable pod or not connected by transmission within a school. This is exactly what our system is designed to handle. We expect to see this, and we are ready to contain it, isolate the cases, and quarantine direct contacts. As a reminder, a close contact is defined as someone within six feet for more than 15 minutes. In Scenario 2, we have cases in multiple stable groups but linked by a clear, common school-associated activity. Again, we would isolate cases and quarantine contacts, but we would also bring in the Department of Health to consider whether it's necessary to take further action, such as moving to a more limited level of in-person learning. Scenario 3 is if we see community transmission that impacts multiple people across multiple school groups without a clear connection. In this case, in addition to the immediate steps to contain the virus, we might also consider more aggressive action, including a temporary closure of the entire school. In every situation, the team at RIDOH will work with each district on a case-by-case basis. As a reminder, we also have a detailed, 24-page health protocol playbook available on [Back2SchoolRI.com](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ugDkk0VCyzX_RpbNTudi_f-CKVsmcDfIpdHl3C3Z--4fzs3K3CqP8OtCm_U19s0te7fBmRSBBPeYEFmZTTVPpjvwIKPxpKDI7aXkpQfEkaSO1CE_N7amb_E2M0UW-MYsOZLW4DOc4IOSjh3OasHwKQ==&c=PLQGQl-RWEr9Fx9VCUcalxDW30xMMPV3Uc7G4FXPXD-d1EnBG1SFwA==&ch=M7_6aalYDu2T5hAtY6tn10u_dePjydyCfb0jrf9FZ3ud5IzPigFfiQ==) that outlines the steps we will take in every scenario. I want to assure you that we are well-prepared and have the processes in place to mitigate spread and keep students and staff safe.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ugDkk0VCyzX_RpbNTudi_f-CKVsmcDfIpdHl3C3Z--4fzs3K3CqP8OamfgCrhsagr1qHLwuTvGxVj4jlsz8AmhgRQVtZNjGrT3QQPuPa-hG_fh2rZNYwCM132zkSvFa-z9DvxnSbObGV7hUd92F63mgszMlhA77vWh2BJaEkecY2hJSsKa3CM79K_12ZBH-oH-4bE4dCkTg=&c=PLQGQl-RWEr9Fx9VCUcalxDW30xMMPV3Uc7G4FXPXD-d1EnBG1SFwA==&ch=M7_6aalYDu2T5hAtY6tn10u_dePjydyCfb0jrf9FZ3ud5IzPigFfiQ==)
---
| Click the graph to see check the Department of Health's [COVID-19 data dashboard](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ugDkk0VCyzX_RpbNTudi_f-CKVsmcDfIpdHl3C3Z--4fzs3K3CqP8OamfgCrhsagr1qHLwuTvGxVj4jlsz8AmhgRQVtZNjGrT3QQPuPa-hG_fh2rZNYwCM132zkSvFa-z9DvxnSbObGV7hUd92F63mgszMlhA77vWh2BJaEkecY2hJSsKa3CM79K_12ZBH-oH-4bE4dCkTg=&c=PLQGQl-RWEr9Fx9VCUcalxDW30xMMPV3Uc7G4FXPXD-d1EnBG1SFwA==&ch=M7_6aalYDu2T5hAtY6tn10u_dePjydyCfb0jrf9FZ3ud5IzPigFfiQ==).
---
| Going into this weekend, I hope that you and your family and friends will stay safe, keep your gatherings small, and wear masks while in public. As a reminder, next week's press conference will be Monday at 1 p.m.
We're all in this together,
-Gina Raimondo Governor
---
| | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903
---
| [Unsubscribe dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://visitor.constantcontact.com/do?p=un&m=001_rvij1smacIHQplL2vH8YA%3D&ch=e9e38b2e-7e90-11ea-b887-d4ae5292c4bc&ca=03da4789-9050-4234-a69e-4cfad0b96c02)
---

Sent by [communications@governor.ri.gov](mailto:communications@governor.ri.gov) powered by

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Five Stories President Trump Doesn’t Want You to Miss
body:
More than our physical health is being affected by this novel coronavirus. With the nation moving towards virtual living to continue social distancing | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=92ed383ccc&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **_FIVE STORIES PRESIDENT TRUMP DOESN'T WANT YOU TO MISS_**
---
| | | [**Education Cannot Be Paused for a Pandemic**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f45419500b&e=3ee4985eea)
_-The Hill_
“More than our physical health is being affected by this novel coronavirus. With the nation moving towards virtual living to continue social distancing, we are risking under-educating a generation. Children need the option to have an in-person education,” physician and Congressman Michael Burgess writes.
---
|
---
| [**AG Barr Says Feds Have Made Nearly 1,500 Arrests in ‘Operation Legend’**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=84c3aa0fcc&e=3ee4985eea)
-_New York Post_
“Attorney General William Barr said Wednesday that federal agents helped make 1,485 arrests as part of the nine-city anti-violent-crime Operation Legend . . . Barr said federal charges can put away violent criminals for longer periods of time. He slammed what he said are often soft penalties in local cases,” Steven Nelson reports.

🎬 **WATCH:**** **[**When crime spiked this summer, President Trump took action**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=127d523678&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**Blackouts Expose Perils and Costs of California’s ‘Electrify Everything’ Push**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c9a5f1bc58&e=3ee4985eea)
-_Forbes_
“The blackouts that hit California over the past few days exposed the fragility of one of the most-expensive and least-reliable electric grids in North America. They also show that California’s grid can’t handle the load it has now, much less accommodate the enormous amount of new demand that would have to be met if the state attempts to ‘electrify everything’” relying solely upon renewable energy, Robert Bryce writes.
---
|
---
| [**Trump Right to Back Arms Embargo on Iran, a Dangerous State Sponsor of Terrorism**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4ca7e9cd40&e=3ee4985eea)
-Fox News
“Iran is the chief threat to stability in the Middle East. A stable Middle East is important to America’s interests. From the start, Trump has sought to rebalance U.S. commitments . . . Unlike Obama, Trump is smart enough to know disengaging from the region is even worse, leaving open running for the likes of Iran,” James Jay Carafano writes.
---
|
---
| [**How to Set World Trade Straight**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5b227da2f3&e=3ee4985eea)
_-The Wall Street Journal_
The World Trade Organization “needs new rules to stop the economic distortions that flow from China’s state capitalism. It’s impossible to sustain public confidence in an international trade system when nonmarket practices destroy prospects for workers and businesses around the world,” U.S. Trade Representative Robert Lighthizer writes.

🎬 **President Trump:**[**We replaced the disaster known as NAFTA!**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c340ae4301&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3643f20222&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0fe7e4dec2&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=f5308e32c2)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

This survey is essential to knowing where the Lehigh Valley stands on the issue of defending or defunding our police force. Last week, my opponent very clearly let us know where she stands as a puppet bowing to the Far-Left, supporting the defunding of the women and men on our frontlines in blue who selflessly defend us each day. name: =?utf-8?Q?Genevieve=20Collins?=
subject: Weekly wrap-up
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY COLLINS FOR TEXAS, INC**
body:
| | | |
---
| | |
---
| Peter,
It has been another big week here on the campaign, and we have reached another milestone. **There are now fewer than 75 days until Election Day!**
---
| Today, my campaign launched its latest ad. More than anything else, **I’m a problem solver**. I’ve helped grow a company that has created hundreds of high paying jobs in North Texas, and helped over five million kids earn a quality education. **We need more problem solvers in Washington** , and that’s why I’m running for Congress. If you haven't seen it yet, **check out our new ad below**!
---
| [ ](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=97c72d32a7&e=68aaeb0998)
---
|
---
|
### New T-Shirts
Show your Texan pride and support our campaign with your own "Texas First" t-shirt. [Click here to order one now.](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=338d854faf&e=68aaeb0998) These are brand new, just released this week! [](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=1b716cbd74&e=68aaeb0998)
---
|
---
|
### Small Business Spotlight
---
| [](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=db2ee1f91f&e=68aaeb0998)Over the last several months, we have highlighted several local small businesses in our Small Business Spotlight segment. We spotlighted yet another local business this week. [Head over to our Instagram page](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=86711e6f59&e=68aaeb0998) to check out our latest interview!
---
|
---
|
### Grassroots Campaigning
---
| Finally, I'd like you to know that we are out there in the 32nd Congressional District, safely going door to door to meeting voters, and we'd love to [have your help](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=1d9c02753b&e=68aaeb0998)!

I've had such a great time talking to the voters of our district, and I'm looking forward to doing even more as we come down the home stretch of the campaign.

If you'd like to join our amazing group of volunteers and come help us reach voters, [simply fill out this form](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=93c67bba26&e=68aaeb0998), and we'll be in touch soon!

I hope you have a great weekend, and I look forward to keeping you up to date with everything that goes on in the coming week!

Thank you and God bless,
---
|
---
| Genevieve Collins

Republican Nominee
Texas Congressional District 32

name: MJ Hegar Battleground HQ
subject: PETITION: Tell Sen. Cornyn to protect the USPS and our veterans who rely on it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
He's letting them down.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e1d/7f51f7bc/43c69b1d/4ef7dc26/3473431451/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | [SAVE THE POSTAL SERVICE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e1d/7f51f7bc/43c69b1d/4ef7dc25/3473431451/VEsE/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-USPSpetition")
---
Peter -- As usual, Sen. Cornyn is carrying water for his political bosses while they gut a crucial American institution: our postal service.

More than 330,000 veterans like MJ rely on the mail to receive their prescriptions, and many receive their hard-earned benefits through the postal service. The slowdown in mail delivery means that thousands of veterans will receive life-saving medications days and sometimes even weeks late! And it could mean that veterans won't have the money to pay rent or to put food on the table.

What's more, the USPS is one of the biggest employers of veterans in the United States.

**We need a senator who will stand up for veterans and the United States Postal Service. [Sign our petition to tell Sen. Cornyn to support the US Postal Service!](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e1d/7f51f7bc/43c69b1d/4ef7dc25/3473431451/VEsF/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-USPSpetition")**
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e1d/7f51f7bc/43c69b1d/4ef7dc25/3473431451/VEsC/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-USPSpetition")
---
\-- Team MJ

[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e1d/7f51f7bc/43c69b1d/4ef7dc24/3473431451/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5NzUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-USPS-vets?refcode=email_20200821.3__1975__&amount=10")
---

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e1d/7f51f7bc/43c69b1d/4ef7dc1b/3473431451/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5NzUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1975&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e1d/7f51f7bc/43c69b1d/4ef7dc1a/3473431451/VEsB/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.
---

MJ Hegar was a member of the US Air Force and the Air National Guard. Use of her military rank, job, titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense, Air Force, or Air National Guard.

MJ for Texas
P.O. Box 7156
Round Rock, TX 78683

Contributions or gifts to MJ for Texas are not tax-deductible.

| | Paid for by MJ for Texas

name: Biden-Harris HQ
subject: Now that the convention is over, we have a singular task, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
We need to use the energy of convention week to go into these final two months stronger, and more united, than ever before. |
---
Peter --

This week, you've heard from President Obama.

You've heard from Senator Bernie Sanders, from Secretary Hillary Clinton, and from Speaker Nancy Pelosi.

You've heard from Senator Kamala Harris, and from Vice President Joe Biden himself.

Each of these leaders made a case for the fight we're up against: the battle for the soul of our nation. They know, just like you, that this election is about coming together to protect our democracy.

**So you might be asking yourself, Peter: What now? Where do we go from here?**

Well, we need to use the energy of convention week to go into these final two months stronger, and more united, than ever before.

[That's where you come in, Peter. Will you chip in $25, or anything you can afford, to our Biden-Harris Founding Donor Fund and become a Founding Donor today?](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_kdhjrb_foundingdonor?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.21_B4_fd-whatnow_X__F1_S2_C1__full&amount=25&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.21_B4_fd-whatnow_X__F1_S2_C1__full") | **Biden-Harris Founding Donor Fund Record**

clean_body: We need to use the energy of convention week to go into these final two months stronger, and more united, than ever before. | Peter -- This week, you've heard from President Obama. You've heard from Senator Bernie Sanders, from Secretary Hillary Clinton, and from Speaker Nancy Pelosi. You've heard from Senator Kamala Harris, and from Vice President Joe Biden himself. Each of these leaders made a case for the fight we're up against: the battle for the soul of our nation. They know, just like you, that this election is about coming together to protect our democracy. So you might be asking yourself, Peter: What now? Where do we go from here? Well, we need to use the energy of convention week to go into these final two months stronger, and more united, than ever before. name: Laura Loomer
subject: "Deranged Bigots"
body:
Now that they can’t ignore me, they’re skipping right to Saul Alinsky’s “Rule 13” in their Rules for Radicals playbook
| | | [](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-389495-918004-5153554-229573b686-5474f330a9)
Patriot,

[](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-389495-918004-5153553-0ae1bc9e4c-5474f330a9) Since September of 2019, the media has been all but silent about my run for Congress.

It was an intentional tactic to ignore me and hope that by silencing me on social media and in the press, I would have absolutely no voice and wouldn’t be able to win my primary to become the Republican Nominee in Florida 21.

Well . . . **they got it wrong and we didn’t just win the race, we CRUSHED it!**

Now that they can’t ignore me, they’re skipping right to Saul Alinsky’s “Rule 13” in their Rules for Radicals playbook:

_Pick the target, freeze it, personalize it, and polarize it. Cut off the support network and isolate the target from sympathy. Go after people and not institutions; people hurt faster than institutions._

Want to see a few examples from the past 48 hours?

* “Trump’s Republican Party now has a ballot full of nutters” Washington Post

* “Pro-Trump Islamophobe Just Won a Congressional Primary” New Yorker

* “Laura Loomer—an anti-Muslim and anti-immigrant conspiracy theorist who has been kicked off of almost every major social media platform for promoting her bigotry— **celebrated a primary win with other bigots.** ” – Jonathan Greenblatt, CEO of the Anti-Defamation League

* “**Is it possible that the Republican Party is now the party of deranged bigots?** ” CNN’s Jake Tapper on air after my primary win.

I could keep going, but you get the point.

They are on fire with hate and fear that I moved one step closer to being sworn in alongside their beloved Anti-American, Jew-Haters: Ilhan Omar, Rashida Tlaib and AOC.

So let’s make their worst nightmare come true!

[Pitch in $10 now and help me BLAST the airwaves with no-nonsense ads that will bust through their fake news narrative and bring us to victory!](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-389495-918004-5153553-0ae1bc9e4c-5474f330a9)

We have to counter their empty “bigot” drum beat with the facts and give voters an alternative to toeing the radical Democrat line in November.

[Donate all that you can today.](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-389495-918004-5153553-0ae1bc9e4c-5474f330a9)

Thank you again for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited.

Photo Credit: Gage Skidmore
